name: Brickell Flatiron Condos
intro_html:
Brickell Flatiron

Brickell Flatiron is redefining the Miami Skyline. The soaring glass tower standing 734 feet tall is defined by sweeping exposures, enhancing the skyline with persuasive curves. It comprises 64 floors with rooms ranging from 900 to 2,200 square feet. The luxury condos at Bricklell Flatiron offer spacious floor plans creating movement compliments of glass walls with curved lines. Each condo at Brickell Flatiron is designed with the highest standards and quality; every detail is hand-selected to blend with the Italian design for a beautifully seamless look.

Live the high life at Brickell Flatiron with hospitality-inspired services. Bringing a luxury experience to the residents, Brickell Flatiron provides five-star service and amenities. The building provides stunning views while you relax. The amenities include a sky spa and gym, a pool, and a 360-degree view of Miami and Biscayne Bay, and rooftop gardens. Enjoy the onsite theater, club room, lounge, and billiards room each evening without having to leave your home. The onsite concierge is available seven days a week to provide anything needed, including but not limited to transportation, cleaning, dry cleaning, catering, and dog walking. A digital concierge app easily allows residents access to building services and amenities.

name: Alina Residences Boca Raton
intro_html:
Alina Residences Boca Raton

Alina Residences Boca Raton boasts an intimate community of living art. Enjoy exceptional private residences, penthouses, and villas ranging from 1,400 to over 5,400 square feet. With Phase One of this project complete, Alina is entering phase two with the development of the final two towers, ALINA 210 and 220. The most private offering amongst the three is ALINA 210, it's a boutique-style building offering only 30 corner unit residences for lofty and exclusive living. This building features both indoor and outdoor amenities with residences that have bright open-concept floor plans, expansive wrap-around balconies, and plunge pools in select units. 220 features 152 residences with open-concept layouts, ceiling heights reaching over 10-feet, and floor plans ranging from one bedroom with den to four bedrooms with a den. This building also includes a dramatic indoor-outdoor art-inspired lobby and almost 19,000 square feet of indoor and outdoor amenities.

Come home to a feeling of spaciousness and serenity. Alina’s modern homes feature light-filled great rooms, soaring ceilings, and floor-to-ceiling glass doors opening up to expansive terraces and spectacular views. Designer kitchens with high-performance appliances, spa-inspired bathrooms with rain showers and soaking tubs, and elegant organic craftsmanship throughout invite you to indulge in the beauty of being home. Located just moments from the ocean, beaches, and downtown Boca Raton, these unique residences offer a sanctuary from the busy outside world. Alina’s sophisticated standards of hospitality and amenities heighten the beauty of everyday living. Indulge in a host of private indoor and outdoor amenities, from a refreshing rooftop pool deck to beautiful green spaces for entertaining and dining, to state-of-the-art facilities for fitness and wellness. The unique secluded feel of the property allows you to forget its central location to all aspects of Boca’s day/nightlife. Stroll along park-styled promenades connecting to downtown shops, spas, salons, art galleries, and restaurants. Discover a sanctuary where resort-style amenities, inspired interior design and expressive architecture create an unmatched lifestyle at the center of downtown Boca Raton.

name: Hollywood Arts Residences
intro_html:
Hollywood Arts Residences

Hollywood Arts Residences is a luxury oceanfront residential tower developed by Related Group. It offers 26 stories and 135 amazing residences with waterfront amenities. An outstanding feature is the collaboration between the City of Hollywood and The Related Group to dramatically improve a beloved 4-acre public beachfront destination at 1301 S. Ocean Blvd. It includes meeting rooms, a fitness center, a restaurant, a rebuild of the public parking spaces within the condo’s parking garage, and a larger community center. Hollywood Arts Residences' convenient location in Hollywood allows residents and guests proximity to Sunny Isles & Aventura (4 Miles), Downtown Fort Lauderdale (20 Miles) and Downtown Miami (20 Miles).

name: 100 Las Olas
intro_html:
100 Las Olas

The long-awaited 100 Las Olas is officially move-in ready as the first new residence in downtown Fort Lauderdale in over a decade! This state of the art building is 46 stories high, as the tallest building downtown. The building has a modern take on integrating one of the finest hotels, The Hyatt, and condominiums. Located in the epicenter of downtown Fort Lauderdale, there are 113 private residences within the building from 1,500 to 4,700 square feet. In this luxurious space, there are options for two- to three- bedrooms with a den available. Designed for modern luxury living, the residences at 100 Las Olas feature contemporary open great room plans, gourmet kitchens ideal for entertaining, and expansive terraces with glass railings designed to provide unobstructed long-range views of the Fort Lauderdale skyline.

name: 160 Marina Bay Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
160 Marina Bay Fort Lauderdale

160 Marina Bay in Fort Lauderdale is a boutique luxury condo building with ultra-premium features. This boutique 5-story waterfront building only has 4 private residences per floor each with its own private elevator entrance to the units. Residents experience 10’ high ceilings with floor-to-ceiling windows, with an east-to-west flow-through floor plan that allows perfect views of sunrises and sunsets. Choose from 4 different spacious 3 bedrooms and 3.5 bathroom floor plans ranging in size from 2,875 sq. ft. to 2,918 sq. ft. These spacious condos feature expansive terraces with oversized wrap-around balconies for the corner residences and east and west facing terraces for the center residences. The terraces feature glass railings for the best possible views accessible from the living room and master bedroom of the residences. Boaters love the convenience of having their boat right outside their door with the private boat slips. Each of the 14 private boat slips at this private marina includes electrical and water connections with deepwater access.

name: 3000 Waterside Fort Lauderdale

3000 Waterside

The upscale Sky Residences go beyond luxury to conjure absolute splendor at every step. 3000 Waterside is an exclusive collection of 103 unparalleled residences each individually tailored to reflect the contours of the building and its unrivaled waterfront location The Atlantic Ocean, the glittering metropolitan skyline, and the Intracoastal Waterway are all visible from floor to ceiling windows in these residences. Choose from 13 inviting floor plans with intuitive open design, including 7 Penthouses. The alluring one-, two-, and three-bedroom Sky Residences for sale range in size from 1,490 square feet to 3,550 interior square feet. The sophisticated interiors, with magnificent quartz countertops and a stylish wine fridge for all of your favorite vintages, each sophisticated kitchen is an epicurean's dream. Spa-inspired bathrooms feature opulent free-standing tubs and glass showers. Every room features fine touches that elevate the mood, such as huge porcelain tiles and European cabinets. The premium waterfront location elevates every moment, and each residence is thoughtfully designed to improve residents' contemporary living. A unique experience reflecting the natural splendor of the opulent oasis is provided by 3000 Waterside.

Residents in Fort Lauderdale can stroll to a number of well-known international luxury resorts and are close to the city's best dining, shopping, entertainment, and cultural events. Fort Lauderdale is the ideal tropical destination. Additionally, 321 at Water's Edge provides quick access to all local airports as well as the renowned seaport of Port Everglades. The vast luxury residence floor plans at 321 at Water's Edge range in size from 2,663 to over 3,817 square feet. A boutique retreat reflecting the grace and flair of the select few who will call it home, 321 at Water's Edge is committed to providing the greatest standard of luxury, comfort, and service. Inside you will find that residences take up the width he building's, each of which has a wide balcony and breathtaking views of the ocean, the Intracoastal Waterway, and the Fort Lauderdale skyline.

name: Akoya at Boca West
intro_html:
Akoya at Boca West

Located inside the premier Boca West Country Club is Akoya, a contemporary boutique design that represents luxury at its best. Every inch of the captivating 10-story condominium was designed to seamlessly connect with its surroundings, Boca West Country Club, through its sweeping floor to ceiling impact glass windows and glass-lined balconies. Combined with open, flow-through layouts, each luxury home is filled with light and boasts stunning views of the tropical grounds, pristine golf courses, and gorgeous Florida sunsets. A feeling of peacefulness and privacy exists around every corner. The building offers floor plans with two- to four-bedroom plus den starting at 2,000 square feet to over 4,000 square feet.

Akoya Boca West was built for ultimate enjoyment with sophisticated design and gracious service. The property offers a first-class experience through top-rated amenities complementing resident’s private spaces. Akoya residents enjoy exclusivity and privacy through building specific amenities and never-before-seen access to the #1 Private Residential Country Club in the Nation. Enjoy a world of championship golf, tennis, swimming, superb dining, social events, and relaxation – all with the exclusivity of a private boutique building. Created to blend the pleasures of an award‑winning club with the serenity of life in a brand-new boutique residential building, Akoya delivers 400,000 square feet of world‑class club facilities and amenities steps from your front door. You’re also never more than a few minutes away from shopping at Mizner Park and Boca Town Center, arts and entertainment, beaches, and two international airports for visiting anywhere else in the world.

name: Aston Martin Residences
intro_html:
Aston Martin Residences

Much like the car, Aston Martin Residences exudes exclusivity, heritage, and elegance. Aston Martin Residences sits in Downtown Miami standing 818 feet high with soaring views of Biscayne Bay, the Miami River, and the dynamic Miami skyline. The units range from one to five-bedroom spacious residences with naturally luminous homes inspired by the love for beauty, created with unrivaled craftsmanship and attention to detail. Every aspect of the building has been carefully thought out to provide an amazing luxury experience. It provides a perfect living place for those that crave a modern lifestyle balanced with amazing views and space.

Residents have access to the sky amenities consuming the four upper floors with over 42,000 square feet. Residents at Aston Martin Residences are encouraged by offered amenities to heal the mind, relax the body, and lift the spirit. Soaring at the top of the building is an art gallery, a business center, a fitness center with private fitness rooms, a spa and sauna, a beauty salon and barbershop, virtual golf, and two movie theatres. The rooftop hosts a beautiful infinity pool with a sky bar, lounge, cabanas, and a chef’s kitchen with a private dining room.  Aston Martin believes in exclusivity and serenity through the butler service that is exclusive for residents. The personal butler services include home management, travel support, boat rentals, and VIP event access. Exceptional personalized service and amenities await you.

name: Diesel Wynwood
intro_html:
Diesel Wynwood

Diesel Wynwood is a 159 loft-style condo residence building in the heart of Wynwood. These residences will range from studios to three-bedroom floor plans, as well as the fourteen two-story penthouses with rooftop terraces. The building is being co-developed by Diesel and Bel Invest Group to bring this truly unique concept to Miami. It is immediately apparent that Diesel Wynwood is much more than just a residence upon first glance. It signals the dawn of a new era. Although its large murals and vivid sculptural façade announce its influence beyond walls and borders, the mid-rise 8-floor architecture and open courtyard keep it connected to the street. It's similar to making a landmark into a home way of life and residing in a work of art; a place that defines itself according to its own standards.

name: DNA Towers Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
DNA Towers Fort Lauderdale

Comprised of two identical towers, DNA Towers Fort Lauderdale is a 40 and 45 story building of mixed-use development at 300 and 330 North Andrews Avenue in Downtown Fort Lauderdale. The project will include 612 residential units as well as 56,317 square feet of commercial space across the first two levels. These towers will be added to the ranks of the tallest buildings in Fort Lauderdale. The development site is located between Fort Lauderdale’s Central Business District and Flagler Village. The residential levels embrace elevations of exposed concrete with gray and dark gray-painted stucco and dark tinted black glass.

intro_html:
E11even Residences

E11EVEN Hotel & Residences will feature 400 fully furnished and finished luxury residences. Floor plans range from studios to two-bedrooms plus a Limited Penthouse Collection and 2 Presidential Suites (each with a private indoor pool). Adorned with pristine luxury from floor-to-ceiling, each residence is curated by award-winning interior design firm AvroKo. With mindfully driven precision, elegance, and design, life here is more like living art. The building is designed by world-renowned architecture firm Sieger Suarez Architects. E11EVEN Hotel & Residences will soar 65 stories with Vegas-style amenities, including an E11EVEN rooftop Members-only Club with a unique poolside venue and signature dining experience. Full access to the properties services and amenities makes living here a natural, much more vast experience for each residence. These fully furnished and finished Studios, 1- and 2-bedroom residences not only showcase remarkable design, but also exude a refined sense of taste throughout every detail, fixture and finish. Choices here defy the notion of what seamless luxury living can mean. From unlimited personalized 5-star concierge services to top tier gourmet dining choices and the world renowned Chopra Spa & Studio, your life here is truly unique with only the most premium of amenities available.

name: Forte Luxe
intro_html:
Forte Luxe

Forté Luxe is a very rare community built on a unique peninsula across the Intracoastal Waterway from Jupiter Island.  A privileged few will have the chance to live in this lovely luxury building. With only 15 total residences surrounded on three sides by spectacular Intracoastal vistas Forte Luxe allows for both exclusivity and privacy. Each multi-level residence blends the area's beautiful natural surroundings with a contemporary architectural flair. The exemplary architecture found here at Forte Luxe is by none other than renowned architect Alfonso Jurado. Wide-ranging Intracoastal vistas, roomy interiors, and exclusive boat slips for vessels up to 60 feet are all part of the Forté Luxe lifestyle. With 3 sides of the Forte Luxe development being surrounded by the Intracoastal, these 3-story residences offer amazing views of the water from nearly every floor and every angle.

name: La Clara Palm Beach
intro_html:
La Clara Palm Beach

Poised between sea and sky, La Clara is perfectly positioned for peaceful living. A place where simplicity meets sophistication and inspiration is found in the smallest details. La Clara is a fresh take on luxury hi-rise living in the heart of one of West Palm Beach's most prestigious communities. The 25-story high-rise offers 83 residences with endless natural light, combined with a boutique atmosphere. Airy one to three-bedroom residences, from 1,500 to over 3,000 square feet, all feature expansive private terraces with radiant water views. Exteriors & interiors feature white stucco, Roman travertine, coral stone, and granite with bronze accents. The 25-story tower overlooks the Intracoastal waterway and the Atlantic Ocean. La Clara is a contemporary interpretation of Florida's iconic modernism.

The premier location and luxury amenities provide La Clara with the ultimate residence experience. From a state-of-the-art fitness center and yoga studio to an opulent lap pool with daybeds for lounging reminiscent of the Mediterranean isles, La Clara brings together the comforts of a resort and the warmth of home. Luxuriously groomed outdoor gardens and an indoor styled lounge, dining room, chef’s kitchen and tasting room, amenities at La Clara are suited for private time to reset and relax, and host company for social gatherings or sophisticated private events. La Clara is a new take on luxury rising in the center of West Palm Beach’s most distinguished communities.

name: Legacy Downtown Miami Hotel and Residences
intro_html:
Legacy Downtown Miami

Legacy Downtown Miami is changing residential hospitality. These hotel and residences were created based on four key fundamental trends including the growth of luxury travel, the desire for lifestyle experiences, the demand for wellness and medical tourism and the rise of vacation rentals. The ideal location at Miami World Center in the heart of Downtown Miami gives residents access to everything and is a popular destination amongst business travelers.. It is the biggest mixed-use development in the U.S after New York’s Hudson Yards. Some of the features and amenities include a first of its kind international business lounge, a one acre pool deck which is the largest pool deck in downtown, a large rooftop atrium and event space with a decadent lounge and seating amongst the gardens, and a center for health and performance with a 50,000 sq ft medical clinic and suites for health and performance. The residences are fully furnished with Microluxe residence design for space saving where everything has its place.

name: Lofty Brickell
intro_html:
Lofty Brickell

Miami’s elite Brickell neighborhood welcomes Lofty to its skyline. A luxury 44-story landmark waterfront building with amazing views of the Miami River and the skyline alike. This beautiful and lively location is the perfect backdrop to the essence of what Lofty Residences bring to Brickell. Residents can expect not only attention to detail and beautiful architecture all around but the luxury of an elite private club and private marina. The residences include spacious fully finished and furnished studios, 1- and 2-bedroom floor plans, as well as a Penthouse collection to choose from. This condo includes flexible ownership and no rental restrictions.

More on LOFTY

name: Monaco Yacht Club and Residences Miami Beach
intro_html:
Monaco Yacht Club and Residences Miami Beach

The Monaco Yacht Club and Residences is a newly built luxury residential building and marina in Miami Beach. This unique waterfront building features twelve-stories with 39 1- to 4-bedroom residences, including two penthouses, ranging from 918 to 4,817 square feet. All residences are delivered fully-finished with fixtures and finishes curated by Piero Lissoni. At Monaco Residences each element was masterfully curated with a rich palette of exotic woods, lavish European and American stones, warm whites, lovely metal accents and a seamless blend of indoor and outdoor living. Each fixture and finish by design. Out of the floor-to ceiling glass windows or from adjoining extra-deep terraces residents can enjoy remarkable panoramic views of Biscayne Bay, the Miami skyline and the Atlantic Ocean. Amenities include a residents’ lounge featuring a library and breakfast bar, curated by Lissoni, exclusive beach access, twelve marina slips exclusively for residents, panoramic views of the Miami skyline from a 5,900 sq ft rooftop terrace, a rooftop pool, jacuzzi, shaded rooftop lounge area with outdoor grill and sundeck with plush chaise lounges.

  • Waterfront building featuring twelve-stories

  • Exclusive beach access & 12 marina slips exclusively for residents

name: Nexo Miami Beach
intro_html:
Nexo Miami Beach

Nexo Residences Miami Beach is made for home sharing featuring 15 stories and 254 luxury condo residences. The Nexo condos offer a new urban lifestyle and control for independent homeowners. Choose from one, two and three bedroom condos and townhomes with 3 and 4 bedrooms. The main difference between Nexo Residences and traditional condo living, is these residences intentionally moved from the traditional home ownership model to a more versatile, flexible, and exclusive experience. Nexo Residences will vary and give complete rental versatility to owners including no minimal short-term, seasonal or long-term leases. Made for investing and flexible living these residences offer on-site professional management to enhance transient experience with no listing limitations (AirBnB, Vrbo, etc.) and on-site concierge dedicated to residents' and guests' needs. Residential features include handheld remote control key access, secure owners 'closets, self- service bundle lockers and a smart-home management portal.

name: Onda Residences Miami
intro_html:
Onda Residences Miami

Born from the sparkling waters of Bay Harbor, Onda Residences are an oasis inspired by the colors and shapes of the sea. A private escape, surrounded by crystal waters of the Bay. An architectural landmark built to offer a privileged view from the privacy of each residence, with outdoor and indoor lounges luxuriously designed with an all-Italian touch. At lobby level is the wellness area with a full private spa, a treatment room, sauna and steam room, an indoor yoga studio and a modern gym with state of the art Technogym cardio and strength training equipment, designed by award-winning Arquitectonica and landscaped by Enzo Enea. The deck level features lush landscaping surrounding a rooftop pool area built to admire Miami. Onda Bay Harbor is the latest project envisioned by Valerio Morabito and Ugo Colombo with the exquisite interiors by interior design firm A++. Forty-one unique residences, with bright, luxurious interior spaces. Enjoy the private gardens and the spacious terraces overlooking the peaceful Caribbean. Personalized services, security and technology are ready to satisfy residences requests.

name: Ocean One Juno Beach
intro_html:
Ocean One Juno Beach

Tucked away in the seaside community of Juno Beach, Ocean One offers 22 ultra-modern luxury residences with prices starting at $1.8M. Ocean One's quality is unsurpassed residences feature expansive main living areas highlighted with soaring 10’ high ceilings, with floor to ceiling sliding glass doors that open to balconies and lush backyards. These multi-level homes are accessed by both stairs and the owner’s private elevator. Open and contemporary kitchens await, featuring architectural grade cabinetry, designer appliances, an island workstation with waterfalls and a large walk-in pantry. These state-of-the art homes are smart, with high-speed technology/security ready throughout. Both residences include the option of a third floor for a 4th bedroom or game room that opens to a dramatic rooftop terrace with covered outside bar. You will find two modern floor plans both are designed to promote modern living and entertaining. The multitude of large windows throughout the home allow for an abundance of natural sunlight to flow into the home.

name: One Thousand Museum
intro_html:
One Thousand Museum

One Thousand Museum was created from the fusion of art, architecture, design, location, and luxury condos in Downtown Miami. This striking building will stand out for its unique appearance as a continuous piece of contemporary sculpture from the podium to the crown. The ultimate highrise will house 83 residents ranging from townhomes to half-floor & full-floor homes to penthouses. Floors will host one or two residences with four- to six- bedrooms. Each home is built with oversized terraces encouraging residents to enjoy the beautiful views overlooking Biscayne Bay and Museum Park. One Thousand Museum is also known as the Scorpion Tower celebrating its bold but sleek design. The tower’s curves reflect its internal organization as it rises more than 60 stories from arrival to the amenity levels, the residential floors above, and finally to a dramatic double-height amenity space on the top floor.

Offering an abundance of 30,000 square feet of beautifully designed venues for swimming, sunbathing, socializing, fitness, and pampering for less than 100 residents, One Thousand Museum creates a six-star lifestyle. Residents can enjoy the masterfully built glass crown of 1000 Museum at the double-height aquatic center and sky lounge offering luxe venues for fitness, relaxation, and private events.  Arrival and departure will be easily accessible in the form of 24/7 valet and security, high-speed elevators with destination-entry smart technology, and a private rooftop helipad for easy access day or night to nearby islands, airports, and yachts.

More on 1000 Museum

name: One River Point
intro_html:
One River Point

One River Point, uniquely designed with symmetrical towers joined by a glass sky bridge 800 feet above the Miami River. With the buildings at 60 floors each, residences will have optimal light and views as the principal focus in the design of the building. The double floor plan and extreme height allow for each unit to have uninterrupted exposure to the spectacular views of the river, city, and bay. The one- to five-bedroom condos range in size from 890 to 7,658 square feet. Additional to the indoor living space are the twelve-foot-deep, glass-enclosed terraces. Enjoy year-round outdoor living. One River Point achieves a remarkable fusion of art and nature in one standout architectural declaration. Residents can expect pace, light, spectacular views, and uncompromising luxury as standard.

One River Point epitomizes the most masterfully choreographed riverfront residential enclave in Miami. Amenities and services provide residents an exceptional resort environment. One River Point also has the largest riverfront pool coming in at more than 130 feet long. There is also a regulation-size lap pool for the energetic morning swimmers or wind down with a relaxing massage in the luxury spa. As its own private island, One River Point is committed to a healthy, relaxing lifestyle. With breathtaking views and full-day food and beverage service, there is no need to go anywhere else.

name: Paramount Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
Paramount Fort Lauderdale

Paramount Fort Lauderdale, Florida, is set along the supremely private stretch of powdery white sands. The luxury oceanfront condominium proudly promises forever-unobstructed views of the Atlantic and Intracoastal waterway. Paramount will house 95 homes with one to four bedrooms creating an uncompromised expression of modern luxury design. Carefully curated with world-class architecture and design to deliver extreme thought throughout the unit wrap-around balconies providing unobstructed views and luxe amenities. Paramount designed the building with technology on its mind using one-touch access to your home and amenities. Residents have the option of moving into a fully decorated space or a raw space to design on their own.

Composed of two acres the incredibly designed luxury residential community is effortlessly relaxed. Paramount offers many exclusive building amenities surrounded by lush tropical landscaping providing complete privacy. From arrival to departure at Paramount each step is made easy with 24-hour valet service and concierge service ready to book exclusive events and restaurants. Social opportunities at Paramount are highlighted with the included club and social lounge.  Residents relax with South Florida's year-round warm sea breeze by the private pool deck or private beach while enjoying a cocktail from the poolside bar.  The oceanside restaurant provides high quality meals with stunning views.  Paramount Fort Lauderdale Beach is raising expectations for luxury residences all over the world with exceptional design and luxury amenities.

name: Park Grove
intro_html:
Park Grove

Park Grove brings a new way of living to the quiet oceanside setting of Coconut Grove. The tower's curved glass facade flows with the movement of its surrounding water. The condominium soars 223 feet high with floor-to-ceiling impact glass windows and sliding doors that allow natural light to flow through the home from sunrise to sunset. For a select few, Park Grove Towers can be their new home. Varying floor plans for the 152 residences with one to four bedrooms ranging in size from 2,000 to 4,000 square feet. Each home was designed and filled with the highest quality follow-through living plans and appliances.

The amenities at Prove Grove rival those of a luxury resort. Over 80,000 square feet of exclusive resident amenities. 5 acres of private gardens. Signature spa and treatment rooms. State of the art fitness center and yoga room. 500 feet of bayfront pools and pool decks. Head to the rooftop for a great escape and enjoy one of Maimi’s most impressive views. Park Grove Towers is a tranquil space inside the city with a stunning landscape and luxury amenities.

name: The Bristol Palm Beach
intro_html:
The Bristol Palm Beach

The Bristol Palm Beach brings a new era to luxury waterfront living in West Palm Beach. Located on the Intracoastal with unobstructed waterfront views, the Bristol towers over Palm Beach Island with twenty-five stories of unparalleled exclusivity. The building offers three- to five-bedroom homes ranging from 3,700 square feet to 14,000 square feet along with high-efficiency noise-reducing insulated floor-to-ceiling exterior glass. The Bristol is a perfectly designed condominium with unparalleled exclusivity. Abounding elegance and panoramic views are only the beginning of the newest and yet most timeless residence in Palm Beach living. The Bristol is a modern take on gracious living with a stunning glass facade.

With its five-star resort amenities, this iconic 25 story waterfront condominium will be the first and last of its kind. The exclusive, residents-only lifestyle amenities at The Bristol are extraordinary. Residents will find the fitness center, pool, spa treatment rooms, and spaces for socializing or conducting business just a few steps from their homes. The Bristol Palm Beach will set the bar for Palm Beach Living.

name: Porsche Design Tower
intro_html:
Porsche Design Tower

Porsche Design Tower is a class of its own with an in-unit garage to house residents' most prized possessions. Nestled between sophisticated Bal Harbour and elegant Aventura lies the luxe building on Sunny Isles Beach. Surrounded by spectacular views of the Atlantic Ocean and Intracoastal Waterways, the condo incorporates a new definition of luxury, comfort, and convenience. The tower boasts 132 spacious homes with summer kitchens, a ventless glass fireplace, and a wine cooler. The building has spacious homes that range from 3,400 to 17,000 square feet. Exclusive to the Porsche Design Tower Residences is the Dezervator, which is a one of a kind elevator that transports you and your car to your unit. The Porsche Design Tower aims to give residents a unique full-service experience with their prized vehicles. Making specialty vehicles a focus at Porsche Design Tower, residents can take advantage of car concierge services that include valet and maintenance.

Residents have exclusive access to amenities, activities, and services within the building:  a private restaurant, a beautiful outdoor lounge providing oceanfront views, an oceanfront fitness center, and a health spa, a movie theatre, a golf simulator, and a racing simulator. Service at Porsche Design Tower is first class, offering 24-hour security, on-site concierge, pool attendants, and food and beverage service. The building is surrounded by fine dining, high-end shopping, and world-class museums, with a short drive to the Miami airport. This building is unique in every way and welcomes you to join the family.

name: Residences by Armani Casa
intro_html:
Armani Casa Residences

Residences by Armani Casa is a 56-story luxury residential building located in beautiful Sunny Isles beach. Soaring 649 feet high the building offers glistening views of the Atlantic Ocean, Intracoastal Waterway, and the Miami skyline. Residences by Armani Casa has 308 opulent condo residences comprised of 2-5-bedroom floor plans that range in size from 1,358 to 6,138 square feet under air. Residents enjoy 10-foot-high ceilings with floor-to-ceiling glass windows; 10-foot-deep private balconies with glass railings and a summer kitchen to each residence. The units at Armani Casa Residences feature luxe kitchens with Armani Dada designed and fabricated cabinetry, high-end appliances by Sub-Zero and Wolf, Armani Roca designed sinks and faucets, imported stone countertops and glass backsplashes; master baths with marble stone floors and walls, spa-inspired shower with Armani Roca wall-mounted handheld spray and large rain shower, and a high-performance Toto Neorest toilet with integrated bidet technology; a full-sized washer and dryer; a digital thermostat; recessed lighting; and more. name: The Residences at Mandarin Oriental
intro_html:
Residences at Mandarin Oriental

The Residences at Mandarin Oriental in Boca Raton is a destination that elegantly blends history, location, and architecture. This is one of the elite locations with a residential property under the Mandarin Oriental name, making it a truly unique community. Located in Boca Raton, the area caters to refined, upscale tastes with high‑end boutiques, renowned chefs, leading cultural and artistic venues, and an electric nightlife that’s cosmopolitan, chic, and urbane. The building features one to four bedroom homes ranging from 1,425 to 8,000 square feet. Unmatched sophistication was designed into each of the 89 light-filled homes that celebrate their surroundings lifestyle with complete comfort and exclusive security.

Designed to impart a feeling of opulence while excluding a welcoming sense of comfort, the Mandarin Oriental’s amenities are too parallel to none. From private club membership to private wine cellars and renowned holistic spas is bespoke living at its best. The exclusive amenities include a tranquil oasis at the rooftop pool with private cabanas, a fitness center with private classes, a meditation garden, and exclusive access to Mandarin Oriental, Boca Raton via sky bridge. Access to resident only and hotel staff makes for a unique experience with any needs being possible. Five-star living is having every detail arranged, every concern is taken care of plus a host of exclusive amenities just outside one’s front door. This is life at The Residences at Mandarin Oriental.

name: Rise Brickell City Centre
intro_html:
Rise Brickell City Centre

Rise Brickell City Centre is a residential condominium building located in the heart of Brickell. It has 43 floors and provides expansive views over the city. Swire Properties developed Rise Brickell City Centre, and world renowned architectural firm Arquitectonica was behind the design of the building. There are 390 condo homes in Rise Brickell City Centre, ranging in size from one to five bedrooms. The Rise Brickell City Centre condos were delivered with a choice of two interior packages and were delivered fully finished. The kitchens come equipped with a high-end Bosch appliance package, Italkraft cabinets, and a 48-bottle temperature-controlled wine storage. As for the many amenities at Rise Brickell condos, residents can expect tropical gardens, BBQ grills, a cutting-edge fitness center, a full-service hammam spa, outdoor fitness areas, children's play areas, swimming pools with poolside service, a library, a business center, a full-service concierge, and more. Click here to see Rise Brickell floor plans and available condos for sale.

name: Alba Palm Beach
intro_html:
Alba Palm Beach

Calm waters. Tranquil breezes. Golden South Florida sunshine. This is the world of Alba Palm Beach – an all-new residential community that celebrates what it truly means to live in paradise. Here in a quiet neighborhood directly on the Intracoastal Waterway, just moments from the beaches, Worth Avenue, Atlantic Ocean boating, and other chic highlights of West Palm Beach, a limited collection of modern condominium and townhome residences invites you to see a different side of waterfront living. This 22-story boutique tower is home to 55 luxury residences. Choose from 2, 3, and 4-bedroom condo floor plans and two- and three-story townhomes ranging in size from 1,745 to 4,500+ square feet. Enjoy unobstructed sunrise, sunset, and water views from the comfort of your home. The Alba Palm Beach building amenities include a private dock with boat slips for residents only, a staffed lobby, valet parking services, resident great room and lounge, a full-floor dedicated to resident’s amenities with a state-of-the-art fitness studio with cardio, resistance training, and studio space, expansive sun decks with grill and lounge areas, and a sunrise pool overlooking the Intracoastal and sunset pool for warm afternoon sun. View Alba Palm Beach Condos for sale below.

name: Prive Island Residences
intro_html:
Prive Island Residences

Prive Island Estates is the sole address on South Florida's last private island. The location will surround you with unending vistas of open-air, sea, and sky. The condominium is a very spacious property that sits across eight acres with all waterfront views. The two to six-bedroom units are up to 9,536 square feet. The two 16 floor towers each hold 80 units and provide unique experiences that characterize the true definition of comfort and relaxed living practically all to yourself. Every home comes with a fully integrated, premium home-automation system. Enjoy control of your home’s lighting, climate, entertainment, and security systems from your cell phone. From the flow-through layouts and deep terraces to the luxurious fixtures, fittings, and finishes throughout, Privé is flawless to the last detail.

Privé features a large selection of lifestyle amenities designed to complement the luxury condos on the floors above. Access to the island is by a private road with an attended gatehouse followed by valet and 24-hour security. The island offers 70,000 square feet of indoor social spaces and several acres of outdoor amenities: An onsite cafe provides easy access to meals, catering, in-residence room services, multiple different pools serviced by pool attendants, jogging trails, nature paths, tennis courts, and a private beach. Residents who prefer to be on the water, have access to a private jetty for guest boats, and a private marina with boat slips. Prive Island Estates gives you everything needed to live a lavish and carefree lifestyle inspired by an island setting.

More on Prive Island

name: Royal Palm Residences Boca Raton
intro_html:
Royal Palm Residences

Royal Palm Residences Boca Raton is a luxury boutique condo building. This New Construction project has a prime location in Downtown East Boca Raton across from waterfront Wildflower/Silver Palm Park Site, a short stroll to golfing at world-famous Boca Raton Resort & Club, and near the Intracoastal Waterway and the Atlantic Ocean with beautiful views of both. Each residence will be accessed via dual entry elevators with 270 degree city, water, and golf course views with the vibrance and natural light of Boca Raton's skyline flooding into the residence. Walk out onto large outdoor terraces ranging in size from 165 to over 2,000 sq. ft. The Royal Palm Residences is comprised of 48 3 to 5-bedroom luxurious boutique residences ranging in size from 2,425 - 7,168 sq. ft.

More on Royal Palm Residences

This nine-story building is comprised of 3 mini-towers, including 6 penthouses and 4 villas. Residences will enjoy its luxury finishes, modern design, and the wellness plaza that combines a state-of-the-art fitness center, tranquility pool & relaxation spa, lounge & wine cellar and a fully equipped lobby with quiet meeting areas.

name: Riva Residences Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
Riva Residences

Riva was inspired by the allure of pristine white sandy beaches and the serenity of its sweeping shores. This mid-rise waterfront property reflects modern living spaces infused with elements of contemporary and coastal styles. Each condo ranges from two to four bedrooms that come fully furnished with professionally designed furniture and appliances. Oversized inviting terraces built with every home provides a private space to relax, with stunning views of both the sunrise and sunset. Each residence has private elevator access, which provides residents with ease and comfort when returning or leaving home. The balance of modern and coastal design features this beautiful collection of residences revealing an uncompromising quality of finish and attention to detail.

With over 40,000 square feet of impressive amenities, Riva is a sought-after waterfront address.  Upon arrival, the 24/7 valet service, reception desk, and security team welcome guests with familiar faces. With over 400 feet of landscaping for a park, waterfront seating, and dog walks, residents will enjoy the outdoors from sunrise to sunset.  Riva offers private boat slips and a recreation dock for kayaks and paddleboards right outside your doorstep. Relax and reset at that spa equipped with steam rooms, treatment rooms, and a sauna.  For residents looking for athletic activities, there is a large pool for swimming laps, and a 7,000 square foot fitness center, both of which have stunning water views.  

More on Riva Fort Lauderdale

name: Sixth & Rio Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
Sixth & Rio Fort Lauderdale

Sixth&Rio is a unique boutique-style condominium with only 100 properties that offer a tranquil haven just minutes from Downtown Fort Lauderdale. On the New River, discover a new level of luxury. Sixth&Rio features elegant one, two, and three bedroom floorplan luxury condos with individual balconies, views of the park, city, and the New River, as well as expansive townhomes with beautiful views of Smoker Family Park. The exterior facade inspired by the adjacent oak tree leaves provide a mix of contemporary and classic design. IDDI designed the common areas and amenities, which have an Art Deco meets French Nouveau atmosphere and are surrounded by natural vistas of the park and river. Sixth&Rio's curved glass balconies and windows flow with the passing waves of the New River, designed by AM Studio in conjunction with architect of record FSMY. Interiors by Steven G residences have a rich and textural aesthetic, making for elegant, effortless, and refined living. Sixth&Rio condos for sale is where life meets style, featuring Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances and Italkraft bath and kitchen cabinets.

name: SLS Brickell Hotel & Residences
intro_html:
SLS Brickell Residences

SLS Brickell Hotel & Residences, located on South Miami Avenue in the center of Brickell, combines Philippe Starck's design expertise with the opulent lifestyle of SLS to create an experience that will delight the senses and spark your imagination. On the lavishly landscaped Altitude Pool deck, where private cabanas and outdoor restaurants ignite excitement all day and late into the night, the unrivaled ambiance of SLS Brickell comes to life during poolside soirées. The Related Group built the opulent SLS Brickell tower, which was designed by the highly esteemed Arquitectonica architectural company. The elegance and tropical sophistication of the SLS Brickell Hotel and Residences are a collaboration between hotelier Sam Nazarin and famous interior designer Philippe Starck. The 54-story skyscraper houses 124 hotel rooms and suites run by SLS Miami in addition to 450 condo residences for sale. One, two, and three-bedroom units make up the SLS Brickell's non-penthouse residences, while one, two, three, and four-bedroom floor plans make up the penthouse residences.

  • Exclusive poolside cabanas, heated infinity-edge pool & alfresco dining
  • SLS Brickell offers a BMW-7 Series limo service for nightly rentals

intro_html:
SLS Lux Brickell Hotel & Residences

Located at 801 South Miami Avenue, SLS Lux Brickell is a 57-story luxury condominium development. It features 450 residences and 84 luxury hotel suites with one-, two- and 3-bedroom floor plans. The units range in size, going up to 1,753 square feet of interior space. The various floor plans of the condo-hotel suites at the development include studios and two-bedroom floor plans that range in size from 485 to 1,080 square feet. The penthouse residences at SLS Lux feature three and four-bedroom options that range in size from 1,888 to 4,247 square feet. All of the condominium residences for sale come fully finished and feature Italian cabinets, Smart Home technology, and primary bathroom rain showers. Additionally, the units have floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that provide a magnificent view of the bay and city. Residents of the luxury hotel and condominium enjoy a variety of additional features.

The townhouses start at $900,000 for 3-bedroom floor plans. These spacious homes feature open floor plans that emphasize natural light and offer plenty of space for entertaining. The townhouses feature high-end finishes and fixtures throughout. The Bennet is a community of 15 townhomes, these 3-story homes range from 1,831 to 1,878 SF under AC, plus spacious 507 SF rooftop terraces (on 13 units). Enjoy contemporary design, excellent finishes and spectacular private rooftop gardens.

name: The Crosby Miami
intro_html:
The Crosby Miami

The Crosby Miami puts residents in the heart of Miami's magic. The Crosby gives a new dynamic lifestyle to its residents, where the best of Miami's restaurants, shopping and entertainment are all within walking distance.Each residence provides a well-appointed canvas for personal expression while beautifully designed spaces set a sophisticated atmosphere. The building will be 33 stories high with 450 residences and several floor plans to choose from. With flexible ownership residents can choose to live here full time or use it as an investment property during times of travel with no rental restrictions. The Crosby offers a considerable number of lovely residential services and amenities including a state-of-the-art fitness center, an expansive rooftop pool, private rooftop restaurant, clubroom, spacious co-working center and more. With 22,000 Sq. Ft. of amenities there is much to enjoy at The Crosby Miami World Center.

name: St Regis Sunny Isles Beach
intro_html:
St. Regis Sunny Isles Beach

Experience unforgettable Ocean views at St. Regis Sunny Isles Beach, Miami. These oceanfront resort style residences are managed by The St. Regis Hotel Company but is a completely private residential building with no hotel on the premises nor transient use. Residents can expect the signature St. Regis service along with flawless craftsmanship, effortless luxury, and distinctive architecture. The 194 residences feature two, three and four bedrooms, ranging in size from 1,950 to 4,680 sq. ft. Sky Villas and Penthouses starting from 7,000 sq. ft. With a commitment to luxury and elevated experiences, the St. Regis residences feature over 70,000 sq ft of amenities with an impressive wellness and athletic center. Residents can enjoy spa concierge, his and hers full spa, relaxation lounge, revitalization spa, individual and couples treatment rooms, outdoor wellness terrace with plunge pools, oceanfront fitness center, outdoor fitness terrace, multipurpose training rooms, spinning room, yoga room, and pilates room. Additionally the mezzanine level offers guest suites, a cigar lounge, golf and sports simulators, a wine vault, private dining areas, a club room and more. See St. Regis Residences Sunny Isles Beach FL for sale below.

name: The Perigon Miami Beach
intro_html:
The Perigon Miami Beach

The Perigon Miami Beach is a new 17-story luxury pre-construction development in Miami Beach. It features 83 luxury residences with 2 to 4 bedroom floor plans ranging from 2,100-6,700 square feet. This beachfront building features unobstructed views of Miami Beach, the Miami skyline and the beautiful Atlantic Ocean. Residences feature 10-foot floor-to-ceiling windows, expansive 10- to 12-foot-deep balconies with beautifully designed interiors by Tara Bernard & Partner. Enjoy custom Italian kitchens with Sub-Zero Wolf appliances, marble countertops, backsplash, and islands. Primary bathrooms feature natural stone flooring and walls, custom bathtubs, bespoke mirrors and light fixtures, and walk-in wardrobes in each bedroom. The Perigon Miami Beach New Construction building features a number of amazing amenities with a signature restaurant, beachside swimming pool and outdoor spa with sun-beds and cabanas, direct entry to the dedicated beach, equipped with lounge chairs, umbrellas, and service. name: Twenty-Nine Indian Creek
intro_html:
Twenty-Nine Indian Creek

Twenty-Nine Indian Creek is situated in Miami Beach's most prominent cultural district, The Faena District. It's comprised of a collection of 11 distinct residences, 8 condos, 2 townhomes, and 1 full-floor penthouse. The two completely restored, one-of-a-kind townhomes have been hidden from view since the 1960s, and pay homage to the art deco design of the past era. The townhomes at Twenty-Nine Indian Creek provide a peaceful haven and sanctuary amidst the bustling neighborhood. They include elegant 18' double height ceilings, private landscaped patios with summer kitchens, and a full-floor primary suite. Twenty-Nine Indian Creek was conceptualized by Urban Robot, a full-service design firm, and combines serene interiors and fine architectural detailing. The area's natural surroundings are beautifully highlighted in the carefully selected materials, evoking an immediate sense of tranquility. Floor-plans for the condo residences range from 2 to 4 bedrooms, the 2 townhomes include 2 bedrooms and 2.5 baths, while the penthouse residence offers 5 bedrooms and 4.5 baths. See Twenty-Nine Indian Creek condos for sale below.

name: Urbin Coconut Grove
intro_html:
Urbin Coconut Grove

URBIN Coconut Grove is the area for life outdoors; lush surroundings, a sail on the bay and tropical greenery promote an active life worth experiencing in your own backyard. Living at URBIN puts residents in the center of a thriving area that is home to top-notch eateries, small-town shops, and a concentration of expanding businesses that value a relaxed waterfront lifestyle. Being here allows you to really appreciate the allure of South Florida living. With flexibility for owners, as a resident Live at URBIN full-time or put the apartment into a managed leaseback, where units will generate an annual return as short- or long-term residence for affluent visitors. URBIN will handle everything, whether it's for a few months or a year, assuring perks that make ownership a really unique and turnkey experience here. This exclusive group of studio to six-bedroom floor plans was carefully designed for comfortable, simple living. These designer homes, which are finished and furnished, are the height of contemporary luxury. Enjoy amenities focused around wellness and community including a rooftop pool and sundeck, relaxation deck, dining terrace, indoor/outdoor atrium and more.

name: Una Residences
intro_html:
Una Residences

Una is an Iconic tower known for its smooth, metallic surface resembling the shape of a wave. The luxury building provides residents with unobstructed waterfront views and a seamless transition between indoors and outdoors with floor to ceiling sliding doors. The dramatic waterfront condominium houses 135 residences over 47 floors. The condominium offers two to five-bedroom homes ranging in size from 1,100 to 4,700 square feet. Every room within the home includes floor to ceiling windows allowing natural lighting to flow through the open floor plans. Each residence was designed similarly to a yacht, bringing a sense of elegance and comfort to the rooms while celebrating the pleasures of life on the bay. The modern curves of Una Residences for sale are complemented by the richly landscaped gardens, while inside there are striking views of the water at every turn.

Una’s amenities represent the best of leisure, wellness, and entertainment. All amenities are set around Biscayne Bay and designed to complement the building's sleek, maritime style. The residents can enjoy a large selection of pools, including a lap pool, kids splash area, and whirlpool. A bayfront pool also allows for a quiet and relaxing place to watch the sunset. A state-of-the-art fitness center with wall-to-wall glass windows provides a beautiful workout space while overlooking the water. Residences of Una are also given exclusive access to the Grand Bay Club located in Key Biscayne. At The Grand Bay Club residents can enjoy the many amenities offered, like beach services and dining. Una provides guests with multiple spaces to relax, work out, socialize, and immerse themselves in the bayside setting. 

More on Una Condos Miami

name: St Regis Residences Miami Brickell
intro_html:
St. Regis Brickell

St Regis Residences in Miami is a new luxury condo building overlooking Biscayne Bay. This beautiful New Construction building is currently doing pre-construction sales of the residences. St. Regis and Related Group present a collection of residences with unobstructed views of the Miami skyline, Biscayne Bay, and the Atlantic Ocean. The East Tower is 48 stories consisting of 149 residences, including penthouses and sky villas These condos feature 2 to 7- bedroom floor plans ranging in size from 2,300- to 8,900 square feet. Residents enjoy EV charging stations, 24/7 attended lobby and 24-hour concierge. Some of the luxury pleasures provided by the condo itself is smart home technology built into every unit, a private elevator and entry foyer, 11-foot ceilings with floor-to-ceiling glass, custom European marble flooring and European wood doorways with integrated linear diffusers in the living areas. This building is located in the vibrant Brickell area merging the lively heart of city life and downtown living with the luxury and ease of waterfront living.

name: Villa Valencia Coral Gables
intro_html:
Villa Valencia

Villa Valencia in Coral Gables is a residential building of luxury condominium residences. Consisting of 39 residences with three to six-bedroom floor plans to select from ranging in size from 2,616 to 6,263 sq ft. Residents can expect beautiful views from 10-foot floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, open concept living spaces and floor plans, porcelain floors, outdoor terraces with summer kitchens for most residences and more. The building is resident focused with over 19,000 sq ft of amenities, a boardroom with conference center, an entertainment space with billiards, golf simulator and driving simulator, and a 78-foot resort-style pool with lap lane and waterfall. Villa Valencia also has a spa and wellness center for residents. Enjoy treatment rooms, Hammam, hydrotherapy plunge pools, his-and-her saunas, steam rooms, and experience showers. Villa Valencia Coral Gables condos for sale feature best in class amenities, incredible city views, with a favorable location within walking distance to the heart of Coral Gables for fine dining or shopping.

name: Water Club North Palm
intro_html:
Water Club North Palm

The Water Club introduces its third and final tower, The Encore. A boutique condominium featuring innovative design with cutting edge features on the bright blue waters of North Palm Beach. This community offers two towers that were built in 2018 and The Encore its newest addition completed in October 2020. The towers allow for through-views from the Atlantic Ocean, Lake Worth Lagoon, and Intracoastal Waterways. Encore offers 30 exclusive residences in a 16-story building with only two residences per floor. The condo offers three bedrooms with an optional den from 2,500 to 3,200 square feet. Private access elevators readily transport residents from the covered parking garage right to their front door. Privacy will be enjoyed inside and outside of Encore homes, when guests come to town book the guest suites offered downstairs.

Creating a carefree, resort style living experience, Water Club has top of the line amenities on its nine-acre site. Water Club features an unparalleled private club lifestyle at the water's edge close to all the shopping, dining, and golf in Palm Beach Gardens. Residents of Water Club in North Palm will enjoy incomparable views and top of the line amenities including a Residents Club with two pools, a fitness center, private sandy beach and more, as well as dedicated boat slips for those who want to enjoy life on the water but with the convenience of a high rise living- very rare combination in Palm Beach County! 

More on Water Club

name: Auberge Beach Residences
intro_html:
Auberge Beach Condos

The Auberge Collection welcomes Auberge Beach Residences & Spa Fort Lauderdale to its timeless portfolio of exceptional properties. Distinguished by uncommon grace and beauty Auberge Residences is set apart from the rest. The building is created with the greatest attention to core values that set the tone for the creation of a decision that is truly authentic to Fort Lauderdale Beach. Condos range from one to four bedrooms and ranging from 1,500 to 5,000 square feet. Flow-through contemporary floor plans with floor-to-ceiling windows filling homes with natural light and breathtaking views of the city, Atlantic Ocean, and the Intracoastal Waterway. Auberge Beach Residences elevates outdoor living to a new level of sophistication with an elegantly designed private terrace for every residence, some with a private pool. With continuous glass railings, the sand, sea, sky, and coastal skyline become the seamless backdrop of the quintessential beachfront home residence.

Iconic architecture, lush gardens, elegant spaces, and museum quality art by renowned artists bring luxury to every corner of Auberge. A world-class spa offers all natural beauty treatments on-premise. Multiple swimming pools with cabanas that offer food and beverage service overlook the ocean. From sampling in the Napa Valley wine room to playing games in the club room experiences have been thoughtfully crafted to enhance residents’ lifestyle and engage their senses. From sunup to sundown and deep into the night, residents will enjoy living life to its fullest and creating memories that will last a lifetime. Exquisitely designed residences, a rich array of indoor and outdoor amenities, a tempting selection of restaurants, and a world-class Auberge- branded dining and spa are perfectly located directly on 450 linear feet of pristine Atlantic Ocean beachfront.

name: MR. C Residences West Palm Beach
intro_html:
Mr. C Residences West Palm Beach

Mr. C Hotel & Residences, located in the heart of Downtown West Palm Beach, represents the ultimate embodiment of modern luxury living. Crafted by Terra and Sympatico Real Estate, this 25-story architectural marvel encompasses 110 hotel rooms and 146 branded residences, offering a diverse range of one to four-bedroom options spanning from 830 to 2200 square feet. Among the 146 condos, approximately 46 will be available as suites or condos that can be included in the hotel reservation system. This visionary project is the brainchild of the esteemed Cipriani family, renowned for their iconic restaurants and exceptional hospitality. Building upon their successful ventures in Miami, Ignazio, and Maggio Cipriani have gracefully infused their distinctive style and sophistication into this development, creating a sanctuary for those who truly appreciate the art of refined living. Mr. C Hotel & Residences will stand as a modern classic, seamlessly melding timeless sensibilities with contemporary elegance.

The 25-story tower will be multifunctional, with the first eight floors housing the lobby, a restaurant, and around 46 residential suites for the condo/hotel program. The subsequent 10 floors will be dedicated to condo residences, followed by the top seven floors, which will host the hotel, rooftop pool, Bellini restaurant, and private club. The condo will offer an array of amenities, including a fitness center, spa, yoga studio, dog run, Bocce court, children's playground, and barbecue area. Additionally, the hotel will provide amenities like a ballroom, lounge room, and library, accessible to condo residents who will also have access to their own private club on the eighth floor.  Construction of the Mr. C tower is scheduled to commence in early 2024 and is projected to take approximately two years, with an expected opening in the first quarter of 2026.

name: Aurora Sunny Isles Beach
intro_html:
Aurora Sunny Isles Beach

Luis Revuelta, a renowned architect, created Aurora, which gives Sunny Isles' skyline a new artistic expression. The Aurora building stands 17 floors above Collins Avenue, has a curved exterior that evokes the aurora borealis' dramatic motion with a look of fluidity. The Aurora supports life as an art form in a setting of sophistication and status as a collection of Sunny Isles' most distinctive new tower residences. The Aurora style proclaims a radical break from predictability from the moment you arrive. The entrance and public areas of Aurora are readily recognizable as the product of Antrobus + Ramirez's outstanding interior design vision. The condo residences at Aurora are built to the highest standards of craftsmanship using meticulously selected finishes and fittings that complement the 2- and 3-bedroom floor plans. There are also a few larger, breathtaking penthouses and amenity-deck lanai residences available. View Aurora Sunny Isles Beach condos for sale.

name: Baccarat Residences Brickell
intro_html:
Baccarat Residences

Baccarat Residences embody inspired luxury coming to lively Brickell Miami. This building's unique interior blends 18th-century French design with 1930s Art Deco to create a “uniquely Miami feel,” including handcrafted Baccarat crystals throughout the building. This unique and elegant living experience is housed within the building's 75-story glass tower overlooking the sparkling lights of the Miami skyline, Biscayne Bay and the Miami River. The building resides where the Miami River meets the waters of Biscayne Bay providing a unique and impeccable view from every angle. Located at the entrance of Brickell Avenue resting on a lushly landscaped waterfront promenade and private marina, Baccarat condos offer an ideal location with artful service and amenities impeccably curated by Baccarat Hotels & Residences.

name: Casamar Pompano Beach Condos
intro_html:
Casamar Pompano Beach

Casamar Pompano Beach Condos offer a new living experience where art, oceanfront, and lush landscaping meet to create an elevated living experience. This luxury new construction residential building is directly on the sand and presents iconic architecture by Arquitonica that embodies coastal sophistication and elegance. From every direction, the interior of Casamar is enveloped with a lovely mix of stones, natural woods, contemporary art, and touches of greenery throughout. The exquisitely appointed public spaces are designed by the award-winning firm Rockwell Group with a curated collection of contemporary art to complement the resident amenity spaces throughout the property.

More on Casamar Pompano Beach

The residences feature floor-to-ceiling windows with flow-through floor plans that provide views of the city and Intracoastal Waterway to the west and unobstructed eastern views of the ocean to the east. The building is 21 stories high, and floor plans range from 1 to 4-bedroom residences with up to 3,934 sq ft of space. Enjoy private elevator access and entry foyers to all of the pre-wired smart home residences. Kitchens are designed with Italian cabinetry, countertops, and Sub-Zero/Wolf appliances. The amenities include sunrise and sunset swimming pools, the Promenade Lounge, a state-of-the-art fitness center, a virtual reality golf simulator room, 24/7 valet parking, on-premises security, and so much more. Of all the condos for sale in Pompano Beach, Casamar delivers a one-of-a-kind living experience.

name: Estates at Acqualina
intro_html:
Estates at Acqualina

The Estates at Acqualina will be comprised of two, 50-story luxury condo towers, dubbed 777 Via Acqualina and 888 Via Acqualina,  introducing an unparalleled luxury residential experience to Sunny Isles Beach. 777 Via Acqualina will offer 91 exquisite half and full-floor condo residences with floor plans ranging in size from 4,505 to 5,146 square feet. In addition, 777 Via Acqualina will feature a single family home, a tower suite with 8,945 square feet and a 2-story 15,332-square-foot penthouse estate, all featuring exclusive, private leisure pools. 888 Via Acqualina, offering 4 flow-through residences per floor, will feature 173 luxury condo residences ranging in size from 2,897 to 3,672 square feet including 2, 2-story luxury penthouses, 2 tower suites and 2, 2-story single family homes, all featuring private pools. 888 Via Acqualina residences will feature expansive terraces with entertainment areas, private saunas and summer kitchens. name: Mr. C Residences Coconut Grove
intro_html:
Mr. C Residences

Mr. C Residences in Coconut Grove is a residential condo building that embodies stylish European living with a contemporary style. Classic sophistication and an aire of maritime tradition are infused into this luxury lifestyle where the details make all the difference. Located on South Bayshore Dr Mr. C features panoramic views from Peacock Park across Biscayne Bay to Key Biscayne and beyond. Enjoy waterfront living with opulent views of the Miami skyline and the crisp blue water from open floor plans that feature floor to ceiling windows and glass doors. The 21-story tower features lush landscaping, a signature cafe, specialty gourmet market, a wellness lounge, private Bellini Bar on the pool deck along with poolside food and beverage service. Residents can expect to arrive to a covered valet, beautiful lobby lounge with curated art and friendly service from the reception and concierge desk. Interior residence features include private outdoor terraces, Italian terrazzo and quartz countertops, custom kitchen islands, Italian cabinetry, European porcelain tile floors, solid core interior wood doors and much more.

name: Salato Residences Pompano Beach
intro_html:
Salato Pompano Beach

Salato Pompano Beach, a nine-story building with 40 luxurious residences, exudes elegance with its angular architectural lines, tasteful interiors, and overall appearance. Complete views of the breathtaking ocean blending with the open sky are provided by the floor to ceiling windows in each residence. The views inspire and influence the design of these homes. The light-colored decor appears to change throughout the day as do the spacious areas that embrace the grandeur of the horizon. Ownership of a modern luxury home at Salato in Pompano Beach, Florida, allows a select few people to live out their love of the sea. Salato is intended for those who are born of the sea: mind, body, and soul—with its  proximity to the beach, elegant design, friendly hospitality, and vast outdoor area to breathe in the salt air. There are only 40 private oceanfront residences, including 6 exquisite penthouses, designed by Randall Stofft Architects and interiors by Steven G. Enjoy the state-of-the-art fitness center, owners lounge, or ocean-view pool with water features, hot tub and spa surrounded by an inviting sundeck. View Salato Pompano Beach condos for sale below.

name: The Elser Hotel & Residences
intro_html:
The Elser Residences

The Elser Hotel & Residences formerly known as Society Residences Miami is a new residential condo building coming to Downtown Miami. It is scheduled to be completed by the last quarter of 2022. The building will have decadent views of Biscayne Bay, the Atlantic Ocean and the vibrant Miami skyline. This building is located in the heart of Downtown Miami near the FTX arena. It features the latest smart building technology while the residences feature custom Italian kitchen cabinetry, quartz kitchen counters, stainless-steel appliances, and porcelain wood-grain tile flooring throughout. Residents can choose from fully-furnished studios, 1, 2, and 3-bedroom floor plans. The Elser Hotel & Residences Miami has lovely amenities to be enjoyed, the lobby is equipped with a cocktail bar and restaurant with curated art and green walls throughout all common areas, a resort style pool with private lounge areas, and a 19,000 square foot (double height) amenities deck overlooking Downtown Miami and Biscayne Bay. See The Elser Residences for sale below.

name: Forte on Flagler
intro_html:
Forte on Flagler

Forte on Flagler affords the view of Palm Beach from a unique waterfront position on South Flagler Drive. A boutique collection of 41 residences with panoramic sights of the Intracoastal Waterway, Worth Avenue, and the Atlantic Ocean. Forte residents can enjoy four and five-bedroom plans from 4,200 to 8,400 square feet featuring floor-to-ceiling windows and 10’ tall ceilings offering sweeping views from the city to the oceanfront from each home. Only two residences per floor offer oversized wraparound balconies that provide the perfect entertaining space for outdoor living. Each residence is designed with the flow-through living and customizable kitchen floor plans with exquisite modern finishes, features, and appliances.

As an owner at Forte you will have access to the stunning swimming pool and sun terrace overlooking the Intracoastal. Residents interested in being active have access to a fitness studio with substantial natural light shining in from dawn to dusk. Other exclusive amenities include a concierge, valet, security, private gated access, private parking. Privacy will be enjoyed inside and outside of Forte homes, when guests come to town book the guest suites offered downstairs. Let’s not forget about furry friends with a Dog park to complete this luxurious south Florida condominium that you can call home.

name: Ocean Delray Condos
intro_html:
Ocean Delray

Ocean Delray is comprised of 15 luxury condo residences and 4 villas with direct access to Delray Beach. This Oceanfront property is centrally located between Boca Raton and Palm Beach and is perfectly designed for the most exclusive lifestyles. Exclusivity paired with luxury oceanfront condo amenities is what separates Ocean Delray from anything else in the marketplace. Ocean Delray, designed by world-renowned architect Randall Stofft, provides maximum privacy on one of the most pristine beaches in all of South Florida. These ultra-luxury residences live like single-family homes with all the benefits of a maintenance-free lifestyle.

More on Ocean Delray

Every residence is distinctive and breathtaking, from private access-controlled entry points, concierge/valet service, air-conditioned private two- or three-car plus golf cart garages, and a highly-serviced private pool and beach experience. With exquisite interiors and expansive oceanfront terraces, Ocean Delray is one of a kind. The Residences at Ocean Delray offer 30-50 feet of glass from their private, oceanfront terraces each uniquely designed with an individually distinct floor plan. The residences range from 3- bedroom plus den to 5-bedrooms, complete with 4.5 to 6.5 bathrooms and offer semi-private lobbies with elevators that open directly into each residence. Each villa has four bedrooms and four and a half bathrooms, and feature private lobbies and elevators, as well as personal and independent guest entries. Residences enjoy Wolf Sub-Zero and Cove appliances as well as Kohler, Hansgrohe and Franke fixtures with custom SieMatic kitchens and built-in wine bars with sub-zero wine towers. Each residence comes complete with Crestron smart home AV packages and Crestron solar shades, plus 10-foot hurricane proof impact glass.

  • Inviting Pool Lounge Suite

name: Five Park Residences Miami Beach
intro_html:
Five Park Residences

Five Park Miami Beach Residences is an exclusive new construction residential property gracing Miami. Clean lines and timeless fixtures add to an environment of modern luxury. The building's location allows for unobstructed views of the ocean, bay, and Miami skyline. This 98 story tower features 2- to 5-bedroom fully finished residences ranging in size from 1,434 sf to 6,000 sf. Within each beautifully appointed residence you can find expansive open floor plans with thoughtful design that encourage an easy flow from indoor to outdoor through 10’ wide sliding door openings connecting the great room to terrace. Experience soaring 10 foot ceilings, Gabellini Sheppard custom-designed kitchens, Italian-made kitchen cabinets, stone countertops and backsplashes, Gaggenau appliances with ducted cooktop vents, and integrated wood top dining tables. Residents can indulge in the Five Park Canopy Club, Miami Beach’s first residents only member club. Enjoy the wellness lounge outfitted with private training areas, an outdoor workout zone, exercise bikes, yoga deck and juice bar with views of the bay and ocean.

  • Club-level dining experience curated seasonally by a host of visiting renowned chefs

name: Amrit Ocean Resort & Residences
intro_html:
Amrit Ocean Resort & Residences

The Amrit Ocean Resort & Residences sits on the pristine shoreline of Palm Beach’s Singer Island, featuring resort-style living every day. The residences introduce a new standard for privileged living, influenced by timeless eastern traditions, enhanced by technology, and presented in a setting of extreme comfort and natural beauty. With Amrit’s completion date set for 2021, homeowners have the option to individualize their homes. Residents can choose from two-bedroom floor plans with or without a den ranging from 1,925 to 5,695 square feet of premier living. The architecture of Amrit Ocean Resort and Residences is both memorable and iconic. Featuring curvilinear balconies, a bright and clean façade of gleaming glass will rise above the Atlantic seas and white sand beach of Singer Island. Each residence encourages indoor-outdoor living with large sliding glass doors that open to covered terraces with spectacular views.

          Enjoy the luxuries of 5-star resort-style living with the privacy and convenience of being home. From private residential lobbies and pool to 24-hour valet service, learn more about the unique amenities and services offered to our residents. For those seeking a lifestyle of relaxation and self-care, Amrit offers beautiful natural surroundings with lifestyle programs thoughtfully curated to address sleep deprivation, nutrition & diet, fitness weight management & beauty treatments. Amrit emphasizes vacation living for its residents, offering access to all resort amenities at a significant cost reduction. The architecture of Amrit Ocean Resort and Residences is both memorable and iconic. Amrit offers each owner and guest the inspiration, guidance, and means to embark on a personalized journey toward greater physical and mental wellbeing.

More on Amrit

name: 1010 Brickell
intro_html:
1010 Brickell Miami

The 50-story luxury condominium complex, 1010 Brickell is situated in the center of Brickell in Miami Florida. Developed by Key International Development and designed by the highly regarded architectural firm Sieger Suarez Architects. 1010 Brickell was completed in 2017 with 389 condo residences including studios, one-, two-, and three-bedroom floor plans with interior square footage ranging from 633 to 2,170 square feet (see 1010 Brickell floor plans below). The condos at 1010 Brickell for sale include floor-to-ceiling glass windows, a private balcony with glass railings, a professional appliance package, in-unit washer and dryer, luxury European kitchen cabinetry and more. The luxurious amenities of 1010 Brickell include a rooftop lounge, a pool that is perfectly situated to view the sunrise and sunset, an outdoor theater, and a fire pit. The club level at 1010 Brickell also has a bocce ball court, squash court, coed hammam, full-service spa, children's play facilities both inside and outside, a virtual golf simulator, a social room, and much more. You'll never run out of things to do at 1010 Brickell, no matter your age.

name: 3550 South Ocean Palm Beach
intro_html:
3550 South Ocean

3550 South Ocean is the first new development in over a decade to be built on the prestigious island of Palm Beach. The luxury mid-rise condominium sits beachfront along the sun-kissed shoreline of the Atlantic Ocean, consisting of 30 expansive homes in the sky. 3550 South Ocean is a seven story building that aims to capture residents for its modern interpretation of a classic Palm Beach oceanfront residence. The condominium features spacious two and three bedroom condos plus a den ranging from 2,700 to 3,000 square feet. All homes provide floor-to-ceiling glass windows to maximize the front row views of the ocean, seamlessly blurring the lines between indoor-outdoor living. This convenient location allows residents to be in close proximity to Worth Avenue’s world-class dining and shopping as well as downtown West Palm Beach.

Residents of 3550 South Ocean will have stunning views of the Atlantic Ocean and Intracoastal waterways, with the tropical landscape of Palm Beach from the residences. As an owner at 3550 South Ocean you will also have private beach access, allowing guests an exclusive experience to be able to enjoy various recreational beach activities right outside of your door. Resort style living at 3550 also includes a beachfront swimming pool and sun terrace to provide quality relaxation, as well as offering VIP admittance to Eau Palm Beach & Spa. Residents interested in living an active lifestyle have access to a fitness studio with substantial natural light shining in from dawn to dusk. Other exclusive amenities include a concierge, private gated access, private parking, and a pet park complete this luxurious South Florida lifestyle that you can call home.

More on 3550 South Ocean
