name: Koya Bay North Miami Beach
intro_html:
Koya Bay

Koya Bay in North Miami Beach is a new-construction luxury townhome community along the waterfront. From every position in these homes, you'll notice amazing attention to detail, skilled workmanship, and elegant design. Each Koya Bay property comes with a wealth of sumptuous features that may be customized to your preference, or you can choose to have the professional design team create a unique living environment to fit your lifestyle. Every smart-home residence incorporates warm, traditional finishes together with aspects of minimalist sophistication. Wood flooring and Calacatta porcelain tile allow natural light to elegantly reverberate throughout each living area. Elevated ceilings and discreetly folding glass, combine to create a seamless indoor-outdoor experience. All of the bedrooms have en suite bathrooms, and the spacious owner's suite has a luxurious, spa-like bathroom with a soaking tub and Hansgrohe fittings. Each townhome residence at Koya Bay is between 3 and 5 bedrooms, ranging in size from 4,327 to 5,288 SF of modern space.

name: Bentley Residences Sunny Isles Beach
intro_html:
Bentley Residences Sunny Isles Beach

The finest in ultra-luxury living is found at the Bentley Residences in Sunny Isles Beach. Beyond spectacular waterfront views of the glistening ocean you will find an elevated modern and luxury allure in every space of the building and personalized experience only delivered by Bentley Residences. The innovation and inspiration of Bentley motors is interwoven throughout this bold and extraordinary beachfront property. With the interior and exterior design by Bentley Motors and architecture by Sieger Suarez Architects. This new 63-story development features 216 luxury oceanfront residences with sweeping Atlantic Ocean and Intracoastal views through floor-to ceiling glass windows and doors.

More on Bentley Residences

Enjoy the view from your private heated swimming pool and raised sundeck or from the comfort of your oversized balconies or Florida room. Private 3 or 4-car garages are standard in each residence accessible through a vehicular elevator system. Enter your new home through your private elevator foyer and grand entrance to enjoy spacious living areas crafted with premium quality materials, state of the art appliances, and elevated interior technology. At the Bentley Residences there is over 20,000 square feet of amenities across three levels featuring a lounge and whiskey bar, movie theater, cigar lounge, game room with golf and racing simulators, state-of-the-art indoor and outdoor terraced fitness center, outdoor yoga studio, a wellness spa, exclusive beach amenities, including beach attendants, lounges, umbrellas, food/ beverage service and so much more.

intro_html:
Aquablu Fort Lauderdale

Beautifully built on the waterfront of Fort Lauderdale, AquaBlu presents a uniquely modern living experience. Aquablu celebrates life on the water featuring 35 luxurious modern residences with on-site boat slips and unobstructed ocean views. Residence homes range from 2,100 to 7,000 square feet consisting of two to three bedrooms. Within the 17 story building, there are only 35 homes offering residents the opportunity to connect with their neighbors or have more privacy if desired. Every unit boasts an expansive floor plan, incredible views of the water and historic Bonnet House Museum and Gardens, hand-selected finishes, and a thoughtful collection of features designed for a life well lived.

Aquablu is a boutique residence with intimate luxuries that incorporates features on and off the water. From its heated pool to the cutting-edge fitness center. Home to people with a passion for luxury and security Aquablu offers 24 hour video surveillance and secure entry access. Just steps away from the marvelous Fort Lauderdale Beach, homeowners have a stunning location with access to the downtown core with shopping and restaurants, and the ocean.

name: Ten30 South Beach
intro_html:
Ten30 South Beach

Ten30 South Beach is a luxurious pre-construction condo complex that is perfectly located in the South Beach district of Miami Beach, Florida. Lincoln Road, dining, shopping, and entertainment options are all within walking distance of the building. There are 43 residences in this 3-story boutique building created by Saladino Design Studios and developed by Shoma Group. The residences range in size from 621 to 1,190 interior square feet and are available in 1- and 2-bedroom floor plans. Each residence includes high-impact energy-efficient windows, designer lighting fixtures, NEST digital thermostats, 12" x 24" white porcelain flooring, and USB charging stations. The Ten30 South Beach condominiums for sale also have spa-inspired master bathrooms with frameless glass rain showers, Italian-designed kitchens with quartz countertops/backsplashes, Smart Samsung stainless-steel appliances and private patios with stunning city views.

More on Ten30 South Beach

Some of the outstanding amenities offered at Ten30 South Beach include an art-curated lobby with a 24-hour attendant, indoor and outdoor social lounge areas, a lushly landscaped rooftop terrace with BBQ and dining area, a rooftop infinity pool with lounge chairs, an outdoor yoga area, a private herb garden, sports equipment storage, assigned secured parking, and round-the-clock security video surveillance.

name: Paramount Miami Worldcenter
intro_html:
Paramount Miami Worldcenter

Paramount Miami Worldcenter, reinventing urban living in the heart of downtown Miami. Over 700 feet tall, the skyscraper looms in the stars. A signature residential tower with exclusive location and right to create the premier luxury residential experience. The one to five-bedroom units with a den range in size from 1,300 to 4,800 square feet. All homes offer 10’ ceilings with follow-through living complemented by floor to ceiling windows to enjoy indoor-outdoor living. Outdoor living spaces maximize resident views and enjoyment of the surrounding day and night life. Becoming a resident at Paramount is bigger than the building with Miami Worldcenter. Be a part of the 2nd largest development in the US with a diverse mix of retail, residential, office, hospitality, and entertainment components.

Paramount offers everything at the tips of your fingers with the most amenities in the world. With over 500 residents, Paramount has thought of everything to encourage a healthy, active, and social yet serene lifestyle. No matter how you get your body moving, Paramount has an option for you; half basketball courts, yoga studio, soccer fields, tennis court, and state-of-the-art fitness center. Relax after a long day at a spa and salon with outdoor bath gardens, steam showers, treatment rooms, and a hair and nail bar. The sky deck offers a breathtaking Observatory, Tai Chi deck, sundeck, and infinity pool. The upper deck also provides a resort-style pool, bungalows, floating seating pods, a dog park, and a jogging path. Making life easier here is an onsite food market to take care of cooking meals for you. Everything you could dream of and more come with your building and the surrounding World Center.

intro_html:
ORA by Casa Tua Brickell

Introducing Miami’s first-of-its-kind destination, imagined for an evolving new world – ORA by Casa Tua is a collection of inspiring residences centered in nature and infused with the simple elegance and sincere charm of the renowned Casa Tua. A combination of soulful dining and vibrant entertainment for both residents and the extended community, ORA is the city’s greatest amenity. Set in the heart of the coveted Brickell neighborhood, it is a destination, retreat, and a lifestyle, enriched and defined by its meaningful moments and by the people who live them — a cosmopolitan center of art, culture, and cuisine. Where life happens now!

name: 501 First Residences Miami
intro_html:
501 First Residences Miami

501 First Residences Miami is a luxury residential condo building in downtown. This building is elegantly designed with mid-century, modern-inspired interior finishes. Residences are fully finished and furnished curated by award-winning design firm, Shim Projects. Residents can expect open interior layouts with floor to ceiling glass windows, custom window treatments, finished flooring on all residential interiors and balconies, and kitchens and bathrooms with custom Italian cabinetry and counters. Enjoy beautiful views of the Miami skyline from your balcony. This building also includes a resident-only co-working space that has boardrooms with video conferencing, smart technology, secluded pods and exclusive private art and music events. Some amenities include a 75-foot rooftop resort style lap pool, hot hydrotherapy bath and oversized swim-spa, north-facing private rooftop movie theater experience, and an urban oasis featuring soothing greenery and plants year-round to relax and unwind at your leisure.

name: Elysee Miami
intro_html:
Elysee Edgewater Miami

Elysee’s design features light, functionality, and unmatched views. Curated by Jean-Louis Deniot, France’s top interior designer, every space tells a story, one that only gets richer with the addition of you. The homes are three to five-bedrooms that offer an additional den or home office. With only two units per floor, each home features an oversized wraparound terrace with sunrise to sunset views of Biscayne Bay. Located on Biscayne Bay, surrounded by world-class dining, shopping, A-rated schools, arts, nightlife, and entertainment.

Elysee invites residents to retreat and indulge. Enjoy the intimacy of a boutique building and suite of amenities expected at a larger condominium, including the services of an Elysee Attaché. A stunning grand lobby greets residents as they escape the outside noise for a residential haven. On the wellness level, Elysse is dedicated to the active pursuit of inner and outer power. To stay active, residents enjoy a full lap pool, an oversized fitness center with a yoga room, massage rooms, a sauna, and a steam room. One of the most impressive features is the Owner’s Sky Lounge, located on the 30th floor. Relax at the lounge with a 360-degree panorama of Miami. The Owner’s Sky Lounge provides for both personal escape and opportunity for entertaining. Elysee Attache offers premium access to VIP events, moving coordination, interior design services, and booking travel for private and commercial services. Elysee commits to the best homes, amenities, and services possible. 

More on Elysee Edgewater Miami

name: Eleven 77 Moderne
intro_html:
Eleven 77 Moderne

1177 Moderne is a 16-unit luxury residence in Delray Beach located just one block from the beach and a short stroll from the Intracoastal Waterway. Upon arrival residents are greeted by a wonderful water feature and modern architectural details. Each residence is comprised of three bedrooms, three full baths, and one half-bath ranging in size from 1,978 square feet to 2,150 square feet. The floor plans for Eleven 77 Moderne consist of three different models, A, B, and C. The 1177 Moderne community features a large resort-style pool, a barbecue area, fire pit with sitting areas, a private fitness center, private storage for each owner, a dog park with a pavilion, and two covered secured parking spaces per unit. The community is at 1177 George Bush Blvd Delray Beach.

name: Aman Miami Beach
intro_html:
Aman Miami Beach

A tranquil getaway within the heart of Miami Beach 's radiant Faena District, offering just 22 private homes with uninterrupted water views. Opening in 2024 The Aman Residences Miami is an impressive setting in harmony with the landscape. A collection of condominium residences that are both unique and peaceful. An unequaled standard of design and architecture. Aman Miami Beach condos represent a complete immersion in the Aman lifestyle– a great possibility to discover the community or simply a location to escape to. Created by Kengo Kuma, Aman Miami Beach Residences have a masterful design of angular yet soft minimalism throughout undulating floors and an interior program that communicates movement and light throughout. The Art Deco inspired design shows the interaction in tactile Japanese inspired materials, whilst blurring the limitations between inside and out. Aman Miami Beach residents and their guests will certainly benefit from unique residence facilities, which include a pool, a great Aman Spa and dining venues.

More on Aman Residences Miami

Residents will also get priority access to Aman facilities in the neighboring Aman Miami Beach hotel which sits in the historic Versailles building. Guests and residents alike will enjoy direct beach front access, an extensive Aman Spa and evening dining and enjoyment in various new venues. The Aman Club will also be housed in the hotel, providing residents with the possibility to relax and unwind.

name: Cipriani Residences Miami
intro_html:
Cipriani Residences

Cipriani Residences Miami is an 80-story residential tower with a cascading glass silhouette. This luxury condo building features a collection of 397 residences including penthouses with private pools. The floorplans range from one to four bedrooms with 10 foot ceilings and floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors and windows. Large terraces that open up from the living area provide sweeping views of the Brickell skyline, Biscayne Bay, and Coconut Grove. Eat-in chef kitchens feature Italian cabinetry, Wolf Sub-Zero appliances, and Art Deco–inspired lighting. Amenities at Cipriani Residences Miami include a sun terrace, two swimming pools outfitted with loungers and cabanas, a state-of-the-art fitness center, private screening room, holistic spa and sauna, pickleball court, golf simulator, and more. Masterfully designed in collaboration with Cipriani, the amenities serve as an extension of one’s home.

name: One24 Residences Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
One24 Residences Fort Lauderdale

One24 Residences Fort Lauderdale feature elevated design and architecture positioned on the widest Las Olas waterway with desirable east exposure and stunning downtown skyline evening views. Boat slip included with power pedestal and only 6 residences total. Over 1000 feet covered outdoor terrace living space with Coyote grill wraps these condos. A private elevator lobby welcomes you into a gallery, then an open floor plan with finished high ceilings and recessed LED lighting throughout. Eggersmann German kitchen & bathroom vanities, Sub-Zero/Wolf appliances with gas cooktop. Master 6' soaking tub & floating vanity, EV charging provision, imported rectified porcelain flooring included. Salt water pool with composite decking, fitness center & cabana. In heart of Las Olas, minutes to the beach, dining, shopping, theater of arts and FLL.

name: The Terraces Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
The Terraces Condos

The Terraces Fort Lauderdale is a boutique building with 18 beautiful condominium residences. These homes expertly combine design and contemporary luxury to present coastal life at its finest. The move-in ready residences, which are located in the center of Fort Lauderdale Beach, perfectly balance traditional design with contemporary architecture in a chic and relaxed environment. Modern architecture and thoughtful amenities come together in The Terraces luxury condos to offer oceanfront living that is unmatched. Some features include open floor plans that seamlessly integrate indoor and outdoor living, spacious terraces with expansive views, floor-to-ceiling impact glass windows and doors, 10’ foot ceilings, modern European kitchen cabinetry and so much more. Enjoy ocean views from a convenient location only moments away from the beach. See The Terraces Fort Lauderdale condos for sale.

name: 57 Ocean Miami Beach
intro_html:
57 Ocean Miami Beach

The remarkable 57 Ocean building has just 71 residences and is located on the shores of iconic Millionaire's Row in Miami, Florida. This stunning building stands out among its contemporaries. These residences are perfectly in tune with the surroundings. The building has been created by award-winning architectural firm Arquitectonica in collaboration with top-tier designers. The mix of materials, the gentle undulating façade, and the flow of the interiors are just a few examples of how the architecture is constantly in conversation with the sea. The ocean beckons you the instant you arrive and continues through the spacious floor plans. From the porte-cochère, magnificent vertical gardens lead you through a double-height lobby covered in natural stone, through the pools and meditation gardens, and down to the sand. The transition from city to home to ocean has never been smoother. See 57 Ocean Condos for sale below.

  • Resort style amenities include private spa, sunset deck, and more
  • Direct oceanfront property
  • Outdoor bar, social lounge, two pools, and a sprinkling of cabanas

name: Seaglass Jupiter Island
intro_html:
Seaglass Jupiter Island

A rare find in a unique position, Seaglass Jupiter is being built on the last location of its kind. On Jupiter Island, the beautifully constructed condo will be separated on both sides by preserved land giving Seaglass unparalleled views of the Atlantic Ocean, Intracoastal, and Jupiter Inlet. The 8-story sleek contemporary build will offer twenty one exclusive residences with panoramic Ocean-to-Intracoastal views. Residences spanning up to 5,323 square feet of living area will fully immerse residents into an unmatched atmosphere of relaxation and pleasure. Each unit will be an expansive three or four-bedroom corner residence with floor to ceiling energy efficient impact-resistant windows. This hidden gem will be a sanctuary for a select few.

Sea Glass offers residents a welcoming destination to unwind, relax, and enjoy. Full-time staff is on hand to assist with arrival and lifestyle requirements. Gathering places are provided for memorable moments with family and friends.  Areas for fitness, meditation, watersports, and even the family dog, have been planned with expert thought. Enjoy the outdoors at every turn. Pristine white sands stretch over 170 linear feet providing a picturesque backdrop for fitness, fishing, yoga, snorkeling, surfing or sandcastles. Celebrate every day with services that are always on call, spectacular sights, and an exceptionally detailed home in a gated sanctuary.

8Hundred North at Victoria Park is an exciting project coming to Fort Lauderdale. Located in the heart of Downtown Fort Lauderdale just minutes away from Las Olas will lie this boutique collection of modern luxury residences. Close enough to walk to the action and dining of Las Olas but nestled amongst the calm and serenity of the historic and timeless Victoria Park homes. name: Echo Brickell
intro_html:
Echo Brickell

Echo Brickell introduces innovative luxury living with uninterrupted views from the Miami Skyline to the ocean. Find your home with contemporary and refined elegance. Joining Miamis' fastest growing neighborhood of Brickell is Echo, an exclusive boutique highrise. Echo will exclusively offer 180 fully furnished customizable homes. At every step, an Echo Brickell residence catches the imagination. The impact glass floor to ceiling windows brings the outside in while the deep terraces offer an experience of dining on air. Built-in technology and top-rated appliances ensure a life of simplicity. Offering specialized floor plans from two to four-bedroom homes with a den will meet each resident's needs.

More on Echo Brickell

Looking to step out of the ordinary into the extraordinary is the standard way of living in Echo. The building provides Apple Home Technology in all residences to make everything flow smoothly between devices and appliances. A groundbreaking design of the infinity edge pool and fitness center suspended above Biscayne Bay and Downtown Miami set Echo apart. Enjoy poolside food and beverage service upon the rooftop pool deck for a relaxing afternoon. Echo is central to all events, shopping, and restaurants in downtown Miami and can be reserved for you by the onsite concierge.

name: Nautilus 220
intro_html:
Nautilus 220

From Sea to Sky, Nautilus 220 features unobstructed views from the Intracoastal to the Atlantic Ocean. With expected completion in summer 2024, this condominium contains 332 units split into two towers ranging from 1,500 to 3,200 square feet. The building offers penthouses with private rooftop terraces, plunge pools, 12’6'' ceilings, and 12 guest suites. The new residential towers will feature contemporary architecture matched by interior designs that take full advantage of the panoramic views. Nautilus 220 Prices starts at $800k and ranges above $6 million.

Nautilus 220 is perfectly located along the Lake Park Marina in the famed Palm Beaches. The luxe waterfront condominium is adjacent to an active marina with 103 boat slips and easy inlet access. A variety of water sport recreation from snorkeling and scuba diving to jet skiing, kayaking, and paddleboarding are available nearby. Residents have access to a resort-style pool, fitness center with Sauna & steam room, club room, mini bowling alley, golf simulator, rooftop lap pool, cabanas, and more. The waterfront promenade will host restaurants, cafes, and retail shops for ease of access.

name: Adagio Ft Lauderdale Beach
intro_html:
Adagio Fort Lauderdale Beach

Waterfront luxury residences, Adagio Fort Lauderdale, highlighting exclusivity and serenity with superb views of the Intracoastal Waterway. The mid-rise 10-story building provides 31 homes designed both elegantly and modern by Garcia-Stromberg Architects. The future home for a select few start at 2,300 to 4,000 square feet of luxurious living space. Floor plans start at 3-bedrooms with add-on dens available for those who are seeking extra space. Adagio combines spectacular modern design and exclusive Intracoastal living. Enjoy and celebrate life in this boutique condominium.

Enjoy the stunning private marina, rooftop pool, and sunset pool with a water treadmill. Adagio provides a home with outdoor activities while also being close to the Fort Lauderdale beaches. The building includes a state-of-the-art fitness center for people seeking an active lifestyle. Upon entry, there is an elegant lobby that provides a warm welcome to its residents and resident guests with appropriate surveillance and security. Per unit, there are two parking spaces available and private storage for each resident, and a pet-friendly environment for those with companions.

name: Arbor Coconut Grove
intro_html:
Arbor Coconut Grove

Arbor Coconut Grove Residences is just a leafy retreat located in the historic garden of Miami Coconut Grove. These residences are designed to reflect the surrounding nature and delight you in a more balanced, natural, effortless lifestyle. They are inspired by sunshine and laid back weekends spent relaxing with family and friends. Life's simple pleasures expand far beyond the comforts of home. The building's features and amenities are designed to complement a well-balanced lifestyle. Life at Arbor is a perfect balance of ease and opportunity– giving you the choice to see or do as much or maybe as little as you want. ​​Inside all the 52 residences, you will discover vivid, roomy, family- friendly floor plans. Every corner in Arbor feels like an organic haven of happiness, with high ceilings, private gardens and floor to ceiling windows. Only a short drive from the city, yet in a world of its own, Coconut Grove is one of the earliest and dynamic neighborhoods in Miami. It is a place exactly where the exotic meets the stunning, see Arbor Coconut Grove condos for sale.

  • High ceilings, private gardens & floor to ceiling windows
  • Only a short drive from the city

name: GlassHaus in the Grove
intro_html:
Glass Haus in the Grove

Glass Haus in the Grove is a Boutique building in the heart of Coconut Grove offering twenty-three exclusive residences. Offering clean elegant style and modern minimalist design, the vision for the building is inspired by Europe’s famous Bauhaus design school. The location allows for beautiful views of Biscayne Bay, Coconut Grove and the Downtown Miami skyline. Residences feature open floor plans with 11-foot ceilings, floor-to-ceiling glass, European cabinetry, and stone countertops. Residents can choose from 1-, 2- and 3-bedroom floorplans ranging from 1,80 to 2,953 total square feet, including terraces.The private entrance to Glasshaus is tucked away on Center Street, a tree-lined lane in the heart of the Grove. From here residents can walk to their favorite restaurants and cafes, theaters and art galleries. With close proximity to the water, just a few blocks away residents can dock their boat at the famous Dinner Key Marina or the Coconut Grove Sailing Club — where every Glasshaus owner is a welcomed member.

  • Rooftop pool with sundeck and cabanas
  • State of the art fitness center adjacent to Zen garden
  • European designed Kitchens with custom imported cabinetry

name: Casa Bella Downtown Miami
intro_html:
Casa Bella Downtown

Welcome to the pinnacle of upscale Italian living right in the center of Miami. The CasaBella Residences by B&B Italia are made to perfectly capture the essence of Italian style. A calm aesthetic, a beautiful fusion of the inside and the outside, meticulously made with premium materials and a unique process. Limitless comforts and a wealth of amenities, all expertly and impeccably crafted by B&B Italia. Two full floors of amenities are available at CasaBella Residences, including a top-notch fitness and wellness center, a game room, a kids' play area with educational games, a large party room with views of Biscayne Bay, a cinema, a wine room, a collection of museum-quality artwork, a fully furnished business center and conference room, a co-working area with a cozy lounge, a pet spa, and more. The building stands 650 ft high with 1 to 5-bedroom floor plans ranging in size from 711 sf to 5,714 sf. The majority of the residences feature expansive pass-through floor plans with 10-foot ceilings, amazing views over Biscayne Bay, the Downtown Miami skyline, and breathtaking western sunsets. Two private elevators and a private vestibule are provided in each unit. For increased security, elevators are fitted with biometric access control. View Casa Bella Downtown condos for sale.

  • Amazing views over Biscayne Bay, the Downtown Miami skyline, & breathtaking sunsets to the west

name: Monad Terrace
intro_html:
Monad Terrace Miami

Experience waterfront living at Monad Terrace. A beautifully designed luxury condo building around a lagoon on Biscayne Bay. This breathtaking new construction project combines luxury and modern design with beautiful plant life and nature draped along the building's balconies. Monad Terrace is in the heart of South Beach featuring two luxury condo towers, the north tower is 7 stories with 6 residences, while the southeast tower is 13 stories offering 53 residences. Monad Terrace for sale is comprised of 59 stunning individually designed residences that range from 2-bed, 2.5- bath floor plans to 5-bed 5.5 bath floors plans ranging from 2,027 sq. ft. to 11,380 sq. ft. These stunning homes feature white oak flooring, luxurious gourmet kitchens with natural stone floors, Calacatta marble countertops, custom cabinetry and expansive private outdoor terrace space.

More on Monad Terrace

The views at Monad Terrace are one of beauty, capturing the glittering view of the lagoon and the bay along with the skyline of Downtown Miami as the backdrop for incredible sunsets. Residents can enjoy this spectacular view from their broad and deep oversized terraces that are larger than conventional balconies. This space is large enough to be used for indoor-outdoor living with easy access to multiple interior rooms or for the perfect dining and entertaining space for family and friends or simply for sunbathing with a view. Each residence includes kitchens exclusively designed by Jean Nouvel as the brilliant centerpiece of the home with impressive cantilevered marble islands, fully integrated state-of-the-art appliances, wood ceilings and reflective cabinetry.

Some of the amenities at Monad Terrace include concierge with 24-hour lobby attendant, full service valet parking, a residents’ lounge, and water sports storage. Some key features of Monad Terrace Miami are:

  • Sun deck with 116-foot infinity edge swimming pool & hot tub overlooking Biscayne Bay
  • Climbing gardens on North & South façades for privacy & shade
  • Located on the bay side of South Beach within minutes of restaurants, wellness boutiques, & recreational activities

name: Aria Reserve Miami
intro_html:
Aria Reserve Miami

Welcome to Aria Reserve Miami, the tallest residential waterfront dual towers in the United States. Your waterfront retreat at Aria Reserve is more than just a condominium community. It's a place where you can engage in exceptional activities, unique hobbies, and enjoy priceless experiences all made possible by a wide range of carefully selected amenities. You have access to everything you could ever want. This pair of glass towers offers one to four bedroom floor plans with residences starting at $1.1 Million. Enjoy lovely waterfront views and the city's facade framed outside your window. Located on the shores of Biscayne Bay surrounded by lush gardens, the high rise building soars over Miami’s chic Edgewater neighborhood.

More on Aria Reserve Miami

Close to everything Miami has to offer, 5 minutes to the downtown Brickell area, 4 minutes to midtown, the design district, 3 minutes to Wynwood, 8 minutes to Miami Beach and 15 minutes to the airport. A new chapter in residential sophistication is transforming the idea of a life well-lived. Experience a one-of-a-kind watersports deck, luxury bayview restaurant, two sunrise pools and a dog park (for residents with furry friends and a meditation deck. At Aria Reserve, the beauty of nature, a captivating waterfront location, sleek modern architecture, and state-of-the-art lifestyle amenities all come together in perfect balance.

Caliza Townhomes

Caliza Townhouses at Silver Grove is a new construction boutique residential community that resides in a relaxed community, with proximity to all that Miami has to offer. Enjoy a tranquil lifestyle with convenient access to shops and cafes, as well as the comfort of an inviting neighborhood. Caliza offers a tropical-modern design that brings a touch of urban flare. These townhomes are 3-bedroom floor plans with each home spanning 3 levels with an additional rooftop terrace space to enjoy. This townhome property was designed by world-class designers to seamlessly blend with the surrounding area with the contemporary interiors. Every detail of the design was meticulously developed. The Caliza Townhouses are in continual communication with the environment and embody the feel of Miami, from the materials used to the smooth undulating façade and the richness of its interiors.

name: Missoni Baia
intro_html:
Missoni Baia

Missoni Baia is a standout bayfront residence celebrating the appeal of waterfront living in a relaxed modern style. Adding a striking view to the Miami Skyline and Edgewater’s waterfront, the building soars 57 stories high. Thoughtfully designed, Missoni Baia ensures that all 249 residences have sweeping views of the bay, Atlantic Ocean, Miami Beach, and Miami Skyline. The building offers one to five-bedroom condos ranging in size from 776 to 3,788 square feet. The Edgewater provides a culturally rich area that embraces a luxurious life right outside your doorstep.

Luxury resort-worthy amenities spread over three floors at Missoni Baia. The expansive list includes a bayfront lounge with a pool overlooking the bay, a media room, a beauty salon, a children’s playroom, a pet spa, a fitness center overlooking the water, and one of Miami’s largest resident-only spa. An outdoor bridge connects the sixth floor’s indoor amenities suite to the flow-through pool deck, which includes luxe cabanas, an Olympic-sized lap pool, plunge pools, children’s water area, and an elevated tennis court. Missoni’s aquatic amenities offer both recreational and athletic pursuits. Missoni Baia’s new splendor Edgewater condos capture the Missoni essence of innovation and imagination. It’s incomparable to any other residential tower in Miami.

More on Missoni Baia

Arte Surfside

Antonio Citterio and Patricia Viel, a renowned Italian architectural and design team, worked with Kobi Karp Architecture and Interior Design on their first-ever project in the United States, Arte Residences in Surfside, a one-of-a-kind collection of 16 perfectly finished coastal condo homes. With its unique location in Surfside, Arte is a luxury seaside community known for its historic architecture and expansive, peaceful beaches. Every residence features first-rate services and amenities that compete with the most opulent beachfront resorts in the world. The breathtaking ocean views from private terraces celebrate outdoor life in a warm slice of paradise. See Arte Surfside condos for sale and floor plans below.

intro_html:
Caretta Juno Beach

Caretta Juno Beach is a sanctuary of elegant comfort that seamlessly combines indoor and outdoor living. Huge terraces with outdoor kitchens complement the exquisitely finished interior design's lofty ceilings, refined craftsmanship, and stunning finishes. Equipped with luxury throughout each home, residents can expect contemporary kitchens with custom cabinetry, custom polished nickel hardware, subzero and Wolf appliances, generous islands with waterfall countertops, integrated storage, quartz countertops and more. Every need is anticipated and taken care of at Caretta in a sophisticated, practical, and refined way of life. At Caretta Juno Beach, minimizing is not the goal; making life simple and effortless is. Enjoy maintenance-free urban living where all of your needs are met.

name: The Hibiscus Townhouses Miami
intro_html:
The Hibiscus Townhouses

The Hibiscus Townhouses are a luxury residential development located in the heart of Coconut Grove, a vibrant and historic neighborhood in Miami, Florida. The Hibiscus Townhouses offer a unique blend of luxury living and urban convenience. The townhouses are situated on a quiet street just blocks away from the Coconut Grove village center, which is home to numerous restaurants, shops, and entertainment venues. The location also offers easy access to the downtown Miami area, with its cultural attractions, shopping, and dining options. The Hibiscus Townhouses consist of 3-bedrooms and 3-bathrooms. The interiors are designed with modern, open floor plans that emphasize natural light and offer plenty of space for entertaining.

name: Four Seasons Residences Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
Four Seasons Residences Fort Lauderdale

Four Seasons Residence Fort Lauderdale, where luxury and legendary Four Seasons service combine to create a new global destination on Fort Lauderdale Beach. Expected to be completed in 2021, the 22-story building holds 83 private condos with front-row ocean views. The homes offer floor plans with one to four-bedrooms inducing furnishing and unfurnished residences. Four Seasons offers turnkey homes to allow for ultimate ease with luxury taste. The expansive living spaces and outdoor terraces give views of the ocean and Intracoastal Waterway. Inspired by the South Florida sunlight, interior design choices include Greek Statuario Marble, custom oak vanities, and lacquered millwork cabinets.

From the anticipated arrival, a team of door personnel, valet, and concierges greet residents and make the home easy come, easy go. Bask in the South Florida Sun while allowing beach butlers to provide handcrafted meals, cheese, bread, wine, and more. Yachting services include catering, housekeeping, maintenance, and ground transportation. Residents can also choose to have room service brought to their room directly for small meals or party catering, making entertaining an ease. Beautiful pools on the oceanfront give residents a great place to relax on and off the sand. The property includes spas, fine dining, and a top-of-the-line design to make the Four Seasons Private Residence a truly one-of-a-kind home.

More on Four Seasons

name: The Ritz-Carlton Residences Pompano Beach
intro_html:
Ritz-Carlton Residences Pompano Beach

Developed by Fortune International Group, Oak Capital, The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Pompano Beach are an unprecedented collection of magnificent luxury homes and amenities, with interiors and landscape concept design by Piero Lissoni®. Comprised of two striking shoreline towers designed by Luis Revuelta, situated on a sprawling property spanning the waterfronts—from Ocean to Intracoastal—The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Pompano Beach give homeowners direct access to both a private Beach Club and private Yacht Club. With a comprehensive array of extraordinary private amenities, staffed and serviced by the world’s preeminent luxury flag, The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Pompano Beach offer a transformative lifestyle and incomparable experiences.

name: Shorecrest West Palm Beach
intro_html:
Shorecrest West Palm Beach

Shorecrest Flagler Drive is the newest condominium to be debuted by Related Companies. This exclusive new construction project features 140 one- to four-bedroom condominium residences along Flagler Drive, offering unparalleled views of the Intracoastal Waterway. From the elegant lobby attended 24/7 to the meticulously designed interiors, Shorecrest exudes sophistication. Floor-to-ceiling windows, White Oak wood plank flooring, and gourmet kitchens equipped with Gaggenau appliances create an ambiance of timeless elegance and modern convenience. Indulge in world-class amenities including a rooftop swimming pool, spa suite, and fitness center by The Wright Fit. With attention to detail evident in every aspect of design and service, Shorecrest promises residents an unparalleled lifestyle experience unmatched along the north Flagler Corridor.

name: Jade Signature Sunny Isles
intro_html:
Jade Signature

Jade Signature located in Sunny Isles Beach is a lovely residential high-rise building. It’s an oceanfront building providing beautiful views of the Atlantic Ocean along with direct access to the sandy beach. This luxury building embodies an extraordinary resort-like experience with carefully crafted sky villas, penthouses and residences further enhanced by three floors entirely dedicated to amenities. This building is 53 stories with residences that flow from east to west capturing breathtaking views of both the glistening Atlantic Ocean to the east and stunning views of the Bay and city to the west. Imagine waking up to water views from each end of your home. This building is by Pritzker Prize-winning architects Herzog & de Meuron with interiors by French design firm PYR, led by Pierre-Yves Rochon.

name: Nomad Residences Wynwood
intro_html:
Nomad Residences Wynwood

The custom homes in NoMad Wynwood create a sophisticated balance between vintage glamor, industrial edge, and timeless design, infused with the vibrant color scheme and creative energy of the area. The brand's impeccable service and genuine warmth are available around-the-clock through a variety of distinctive and tailored amenities. Owners at NoMad Residences Wynwood have the choice and flexibility to live anywhere in the world with flexible ownership and no rental restrictions. Enjoy your home at Nomad year round or allow it to make money for you while you're away by using it as a short-term rental for guests. Each condominium is furnished and finished with an identifiable blend of irreverence and elegance, warmth and wonder, New York City-born legacy, and Miami overtones for living a full and exciting life.

More on NoMad Residences

These residences are as rich, imaginative, and inspired as NoMad's most prized hotels. NoMad condos are within close proximity to over 70 galleries, upscale retailers, five-star restaurants, and one of the largest street art original works in the world, set amid the vibrant and creative Wynwood neighborhood; the center of culture for Miami. Wynwood provides a unique opportunity to live in the middle of it all, just south of the Miami Design District, a few miles from the airport, and only a few minutes from Miami Beach.

name: La Baia Bay Harbor Islands
intro_html:
La Baia Bay Harbor Islands

La Baia Bay Harbor is a New Construction condo building located on Bay Harbor Islands. Offering luxury on the waterfront, La Baia Residences are complete with their own private marina. This boutique bayfront condominium offers 68 luxurious, one- to four-bedroom residences spanning between 1,125 to 2,500 square feet. Aside from beautiful views of Biscayne Bay, the Atlantic Ocean, Bal Harbour, Miami Beach, and Downtown Miami, La Baia has resort style amenities for the whole family to enjoy. There are 30,000 square feet of resort-style amenities and a 6,000 square foot amenity deck with panoramic views, a rooftop pool and dedicated Kids’ and Adult areas. Residents get to enjoy a rooftop pool with a 10’ sunshelf and lounge chairs, the state-of-the art fitness center, a Clubroom, a teens gaming center, a children’s splash pad and swing set, a pet grooming station, an outdoor reflection lawn with cascading water features for yoga and stretching, a water sports launch deck for kayaking, paddle boarding and much more.

More on La Baia Bay Harbor

The third Level Breezeway outdoor lounge has pergolas, climbing vine walls and fragrant trees for organic aromatherapy. Residences are delivered fully-finished residences, including wide-plank European flooring, 9’ ceilings, Italian cabinetry by Snaidero, and appliances by Miele the in kitchens. Experience luxury and contemporary design at La baia. Internationally acclaimed architect Luis Revuelta will be leading the design while the landscape will be envisioned by Enzo Enea.

name: Okan Tower Miami
intro_html:
Okan Tower Miami

Okan Tower is a new luxury highrise project that is located in the heart of Downtown Miami. It stands 956 feet high with breathtaking views of the city. The 76 floors with 389 units in the building. Residents have a choice of 1-3 bedrooms or studios, with sizes ranging from 450 to 2150 square feet. With the building being located Downtown, residents have access to everything from the best dining options, to luxury retailers, and the art and design districts.

  The building brings lots of open space with its 10 foot ceiling heights. Units are all stocked with top of the line appliances and smart home technology. The building houses three swimming pools including a Sky Pool on the 70th floor with panoramic views. Full service spas, bars, movie theatre, and chef and gastro kitchen are also located in the building. The building strives to provide luxuries that enrich the lives of the people who visit and live here.

name: Natiivo Miami
intro_html:
Natiivo Miami

Natiivo Miami is the first CondoHospitality residential tower in the heart of Downtown Miami, Florida. Natiivo Miami is ideally located in Miami’s rapidly growing cultural hub surrounded by a variety of art, architecture, museums, theater, shopping and dining that Miami has to offer. These new construction condos are delivered fully-finished and furnished offering homeowners luxuries and service expected from a hotel. This vertically integrated community stands 51 stories high and features 448 condo residences, a 240-unit hotel named Gale Miami, in addition to the private social club Natiivo Social with over 70,000 square feet of amenities and a culinary experience by LDV Hospitality.

More on Natiivo Miami

Choose from Studio, one-, two-, three-, and four-bedroom floor plans and experience urban luxury residences with modern open layouts ranging from 410 to 2,200 sq ft. In addition, future residents can enjoy a resort-style pool and fitness center inclusive of a Peleton studio, boxing ring, yoga and pilates lounge, and more. It’s also home to Creative HQ, Miami’s first-ever creative office space.

name: View Pointe Residences Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
View Pointe Residences Fort Lauderdale

View Pointe Residences Fort Lauderdale is a boutique new construction project consisting of only 6 beautifully designed residences. The 2- to 4-bedroom floor plans boast spacious open layouts that flow through the units with breathtaking views of three canals, including the Barcelona canal, the widest canal of the isles. Enjoy high ceilings, pristine and modern interiors, spacious east facing balconies, and the unique private location. The light and airy interiors perfectly compliment the desirable location and broad views. With the added benefit of boat slips and a location along the canal, boats have unobstructed access with no fixed bridges to the Intracoastal Waterway and the Atlantic Ocean. See View Pointe Residences for Sale.

name: Ocean Park South Beach
intro_html:
Ocean Park South Beach

Ocean Park South Beach is a boutique residential condo building offering ten, two- to four- bedroom luxurious condos in the distinctive South of Fifth neighborhood in Miami Beach. This iconic address is situated on Ocean Drive across from the ocean and the park. South of Fifth in Miami 's South Beach is one of the most exclusive upscale neighborhoods in the nation. This area gives a true beach lifestyle that is both comfortable and opulent.The building features curated amenities, sophisticated organic interiors, thoughtfully designed floorplans, and expansive terraces for a lifestyle perfectly suited for the idyllic location. Residents can expect Private and semi-private elevators that open directly to residence foyers, open floorplan layouts with approximately 10’ ceilings, floor-to-ceiling windows with approximately 10’ sliding doors, silestone Calacatta grooved waterfall edge countertops and back-splashes, and gracious closet space throughout all bedrooms.

name: Ritz-Carlton Palm Beach Gardens
intro_html:
Ritz-Carlton Palm Beach Gardens

Located in beautiful Palm Beach Gardens The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Palm Beach Gardens is stamped with luxury and personalized service. An eye-catching property on the waterfront that exemplifies contemporary luxury along with privacy. This is the first and only luxury marina-front condominium residence in Palm Beach Gardens residing on 850 ft of Intracoastal Waterway. These gated residences are not only exclusive but are expertly designed with a steadfast standard of luxury that is unmatched in South Florida. The building will be comprised of 98 condos, residents can choose from three, four, and five bedroom residences. Landing at PGA Waterway features exceptional finishes, lovely waterfront views, expansive balconies with glass railings, an infinity-edge heated swimming pool, cabanas overlooking the Intracoastal, a limited collection of boat slips for vessels up to 75 feet, with direct access to Palm Beach Inlet, a waterfront clubhouse, state-of-the-art fitness center and much more.

name: Turnberry Ocean Club Residences
intro_html:
Turnberry Ocean Club Residences

Turnberry Ocean Club Residences is one of Miami’s newest and most sophisticated condominiums to open on Sunny Isles Beach. Welcome to Turnberry Ocean Club Residences, an exclusive condo building by Fontainebleau Development. The building tops off at 54 floors boasting an all-glass ultra-luxe design. The luxury homes range from about 2,900 square feet to over 10,000 square feet. Residences are available in 3 to 6 bedroom floor plans featuring an ocean and bay terrace, summer kitchen, 10-foot ceilings, and staff quarters. Sitting directly on the ocean, this building features all flow-through residences, each with direct, unobstructed ocean and Intracoastal views. See Turnberry Condos for sale.

Owners of Turnberry Ocean Club Residences are introduced to grand, spacious designs all around them. A three-story dramatic glass lobby, to an incredible three-level amenity deck on the 30th floor, with swimming pools, pool bar, fitness center, and cabanas. The condo will also feature 35 cabanas for purchase. Owners of Turnberry Ocean Club will have membership privileges available at Turnberry Isle Resort, including golf, tennis, and marina activities (monthly dues not included in condominium maintenance). The Turnberry has thought of everything, so you don't have to. 

More on Turnberry Condos

  • Located on the beach with direct ocean and Intracoastal views
  • 70,000 SqFt of amenities on six levels including a sky pool
  • Access to Turnberry’s golf, tennis, marina, resort & private aviation

name: Olara West Palm Beach
intro_html:
Olara West Palm Beach

With its panoramic views of the Intracoastal Waterway, Palm Beach Island, and the Atlantic Ocean, Olara is a luxurious waterfront residential haven in the Palm Beaches. Olara is the newest and most exclusive development, distinguished by a private marina with direct Intracoastal access, and close proximity to top-notch shopping and restaurants. Olara offers exquisitely designed two- to four-bedroom plus den residences and an amazing, two-acre suite of resort-inspired indoor and outdoor amenities and services. Rising 26 stories offering 275 superbly designed residences with a variety of floor plans. Gabellini Sheppard's interior designs exhibit a simple yet exquisite harmony of elements. Each and every element is appealing and created with your peace of mind, wellbeing, and comfort in mind. Huge floor-to-ceiling windows that let in plenty of sunlight and provide panoramic views of the Intracoastal, the Atlantic Ocean, and the city opening up to gracious 10-foot deep terraces.

name: Pier 66 Residences Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
Pier 66 Residences Fort Lauderdale

Introducing The Residences at Pier Sixty-Six, a collection of exclusive homes with some of South Florida's most treasured vistas. This exclusive collection of two- to four-bedroom condominium units with large private terraces are nestled inside a reinvented and iconic 32-acre resort and marina that overlooks Fort Lauderdale's renowned marinas and waterways. This is a rare opportunity to own property in such an exclusive space. A boutique collection of only 31 villas are offered at Pier 66 Residences. Located in two waterfront buildings, the tastefully curated homes will be between 1,600 and more than 3,800 spacious square feet. In addition to member-only resort services and a lofty list of amenities, Pier 66 will provide white glove service and the opportunity to experience a luxurious resort lifestyle. Together, two four-story villa buildings with 31 units each and two 11-story condo buildings also with 31 units, each make up the Pier 66 Residences. Unit sizes in condo buildings range from 2600 to 2700 square feet with open floor plans to enjoy the picturesque water view.

name: The Ritz Carlton Residences Miami Beach
intro_html:
The Ritz Carlton Residences Miami Beach

Ritz Carlton Residences have connected inside and out so seamlessly residents will hardly know when homes end and the gardens begin. Architect Piero Lissoni makes minimalism welcoming; a modern approach to design with refined finishes and elegant touches at every turn. The condos provide unobstructed views of lake, city, and ocean spread over seven acres. The Ritz Carlton Residences, Miami Beach, offers a private collection of 111 condos including lofts, penthouses, and 15 standalone villas. 60 distinct floor plans with 1 to 5-bedrooms layouts, ranging from 1,922 to over 10,000 square feet. Residents are greeted with the heart of the home, a grand kitchen with designer appliance suites. Private terraces with plunge pools to perfect the outdoor vision. A masterful result of elegant simplicity. 

The residences are an enhanced Miami Beach experience with the gold standard of service by The Ritz-Carlton brand. The condo transformed residential living into a luxury resort experience, beating all expectations. Complementing the building's high-end design and service is the waterfront amenities, location, and lifestyle. A spacious rooftop pool deck with cabana, grille, lush meditation garden, and desiccated boat slips. The Ritz Carlton provides a life lived to the fullest that goes above and beyond other Miami Beach destinations that only provide an address. 

More on The Residences Miami Beach

Ritz Carlton Residences Miami

The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Miami Beach is an exquisite collection of 111 luxurious waterfront Miami Beach condos and 15 stand-alone villas designed by Master Italian Architect Piero Lissoni, with impeccable service by The Ritz-Carlton. Private, waterfront residences with 1 to 5 bedrooms layouts, ranging from 1,922 to over 10,000 square feet. Some Key Features of The Residences Miami Beach are:

  • Spread across 7 acres with vast views of lake, ocean and city
  • Rooftop pool with spacious cabanas & poolside grille, and boat slips on a private waterway
  • Ritz Carlton's gold level of service with an elevated beach experience

name: Selene Ft Lauderdale
intro_html:
Selene Oceanfront Residences

Soaring to 300 feet, the two slender towers of Fort Lauderdale’s newest luxury condominium are also the tallest on its award-winning beachfront, showcasing unparalleled panoramic Atlantic Ocean, Intracoastal, and city skyline views. At Selene, contemporary architecture by Kobi Karp, spacious residences with expansive private terraces, a host of indoor and outdoor resort-style amenities, and an unrivaled oceanfront dining experience all come together to offer a lifestyle of genuinely relaxed elegance.

Selene’s two- and three-bedroom residences and limited collection of penthouses have been designed to the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship. Flowing contemporary floorplans with floor-to-ceiling windows showcase exceptional direct Atlantic Ocean, Intracoastal, or dynamic city skyline views from most residences. Residences come ready for your own customization after occupancy, or luxurious designer finish packages are available. With flow-through interiors and expansive private terraces, Selene’s architecturally distinctive residences are designed with every detail for the way people live, relax, and entertain today.

name: Smart Brickell
intro_html:
Smart Brickell

Smart Brickell is a new residential condo building in Brickell that allows for a truly flexible way of life. Along with stunning views, amazing service, and modern design, home sharing is one of the benefits of life at Smart Brickell. Owners have the option to live in their unit or rent it out while they are away. Miami not only attracts seasonal renters but also buyers who intend to call Miami home, only several months out of the year making this a true perk for many future residents. Units are approved through airbnb and other platforms so that owners can rent their units without restriction. Smart Brickell also offers a comfortable way of living with two resort-style pools for relaxing and soaking in the sun. Spend your time on the 8th floor amenities deck taking a night swim or simply overlooking the views of Brickell. Additionally enjoy a rooftop bar and lounge, fitness center, and co-working space at your leisure. This 23-story building offers 71 1 to 2 bedroom condominiums along with lodging units. Residences are delivered fully finished and furnished featuring floor to ceiling glass windows with custom window treatment, balconies, custom Italian cabinetry and countertops, and more.

name: South Flagler House West Palm Beach
intro_html:
South Flagler House

South Flagler House is a luxury condo development in West Palm Beach. This new construction project consists of two, 27-story waterfront towers. South Flagler House is located at 1355 South Flagler Drive situated near the new construction Forte’ luxury condo development. Units at South Flagler will range from three-bedroom to six-bedroom condos, with penthouse residences and townhomes also on the property. These carefully curated residences will artfully blend the traditional elegance of Palm Beach with the conveniences and comforts of contemporary luxury living. Residents at South Flagler House can enjoy waterfront swimming pools and cabanas, along with private gardens, a state-of-the-art wellness facility, and so much more.

name: 5000 North Ocean
intro_html:
5000 North Ocean

5000 North Ocean, a South Florida beachside oasis designed to enjoy picturesque oceanfront and Intracoastal views. The building focuses on modern design with expansive two, three & four bedroom floor plans that feature views from every room. Located on 340 feet of direct oceanfront, all 48 residences have oversized terraces with outdoor living and private oceanfront dining. Generous great room designs fill with natural light from the floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors and windows. The adjoining gourmet kitchens feature large social islands inviting interaction among family and friends.

5000 North Ocean’s bold tropical modern design offers a refreshing style paired with resident-only amenities and services. Seaside amenities include an oceanfront pool, Oasis Beach Zone, state-of-the-art Fitness Center, engaging seating areas to host friends and guests, and a Resident Club Room for entertaining, relaxation or meetings. Secured residential garage parking, climate controlled resident storage, and the latest access control technology ensure a private gated community. 

More on 5000 North Ocean

The Fairchild Residences

The Fairchild in Coconut Grove is a community of twenty six waterfront residences which include indoor and outdoor amenities. Located directly on Biscayne Bay, the Fairchild Coconut Grove is designed to become the ultimate living experience and sanctuary. All the residences offer lofty open floor plans with 11’ ceilings. Enjoy  beautiful water views from your window and luxury interiors that include natural stone floors, solid wood doors, crafted cabinetry, Wolf gas powered ranges, stainless steel sub-zero refrigerators and more. Coconut Grove is known for its tropical beauty, curb appeal and botanical gardens. Experience the charm and peace of a quiet relaxed lifestyle with understated luxury while also being only moments away from the more metropolitan areas of Miami.

name: The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Sunny Isles Beach
intro_html:
The Ritz-Carlton

The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Sunny Isles Beach is a luxury residential oceanfront building. A winding driveway, facing the ocean, leads up to the stunning 649 ft. residential tower, composed of 212 condominium homes for sale—including four penthouses with private pools. This is one of the few standalone Ritz-Carlton Residences in the world and the building will blend the recognized service of The Ritz-Carlton brand with contemporary architecture, stunning ocean views and distinguished style. Designed to provide sweeping views of the Atlantic Ocean, it is set upon a quiet barrier island bounded by the Atlantic Ocean to the east and the Intracoastal Waterway to the west. The property will feature 2.2 acres of lush landscaping, pools and private beach amenities. The spacious residence floor plans will feature cascading terraces with 360-degree views of the expansive ocean along with breathtaking views of the city skyline and the Intracoastal Waterway.

More on Ritz-Carlton Residences Sunny Isles

The immaculate interiors incorporate the finest in Italian craftsmanship by designer Michele Bönan. Residents can choose between 2- 3- and 4-bedroom homes and four top-floor penthouses, with no more than five residences per floor. Spacious floor plans range from 1,605 to 3,640 square feet with glass walls and balconies that leave nothing between you and an oceanfront lifestyle. Each of the penthouses are complete with flow-through layouts, private rooftop pools, garden terraces, summer kitchens, 13-foot ceilings, separate service quarters, impeccable finishes and fixtures, and up to five large bedrooms, starting at 6,000 square feet of total space. The Ritz-Carlton Residences for sale located in Sunny Isles Beach are in the preconstruction sales phase for more information fill out the form below.

Ritz-Carlton Residences

The Ritz-Carlton Residences is located in the heart of Sunny Isles Beach, between the prestigious Bal Harbor Shops and Aventura Mall, near both Miami and Fort Lauderdale International Airports. Some Key Features of The Ritz-Carlton Residences are:

  • Fully equipped private residential building, with no transient use
  • Private beach amenities including cabanas, chaise lounges & umbrellas with an oceanfront fitness center
  • 33rd floor private club level includes a lounge/bar area, private dining, business center, media room, & library

name: Urbin Miami Beach
intro_html:
Urbin Miami Beach

In the heart of a vibrant scene, URBIN will be the new home for the city’s tastemakers. Just steps from white sands, whether for work or fun, spend time in the local neighborhood, have access to a renowned cultural scene and live where the world vacations. Ownership at URBIN means flexibility. Live at URBIN as a full-time resident or place the unit into a managed leaseback, where units will earn an annual return as a short term or long term home for sophisticated guests. Whether it’s for a few months or one year, URBIN will manage everything, ensuring benefits that make ownership a truly unique and turnkey experience for everyone. A modern mid-rise with a stunning rooftop terrace, elevated ocean views and a short walk to the Atlantic Ocean, URBIN Miami Beach brings together the true meaning of work-life balance with dedicated spaces for work, wellness, culinary experiences, and entertainment.

name: 2000 Ocean Hallandale Beach
intro_html:
2000 Ocean Hallandale Beach

2000 Ocean is a 38 floor luxurious beachfront glass tower located in Hallandale Beach, Florida. On the pristine sandy beaches sits a private residential enclave that is highly sophisticated and offers not only an elevated landscape but an elevated life. 2000 Ocean embodies nature, inside and out. Only 64 families will have the privilege of getting to live in this perfectly positioned building that is bathed in sun-filled rooms from sunrise to sunset. The building consists of half-floor residences, full-floor penthouse residences, and a one of a kind duplex sky villa with a private pool deck. 2000 Ocean offers 3- to 5-bedrooms with an optional den ranging from 2,900 to 9,300 square feet.

All residents will have exclusive views of both the Intracoastal and oceanfront, as each condo is set up with two private terraces; one facing eastward and one westward. With special attention focused on the flow-through layout, you will feel the outdoor landscape flow inside. The design of each space encourages natural, easygoing movement. 2000 Ocean brings the finest elements of the world’s most luxurious resorts into a private residential community. Poolside and beach butler services allow residents to fully enjoy their time spent on the property. The building amenities were designed to create a sanctuary outdoors. Residents will enjoy an east-facing sunrise lounge, west-facing sunset lounge and terrace curated gardens, an outdoor fireplace, and an Oceanside cafe. The Spa Pavilion invites residents to bring the greatest care to their health and well-being by offering spa treatments, an ice room, a yoga studio, and steam baths. 2000 Ocean went above and beyond to create a sanctuary.   

More on 2000 Ocean

name: W Residences Fort Lauderdale
intro_html:
The W Residences Fort Lauderdale

The W Residences in Fort Lauderdale have reimagined high rise oceanfront living. The W is comprised of 171 luxury condos perfectly positioned between the ocean and Intracoastal. The bold two bedroom condos are available in 4 different floor plans: Haven, Oasis, Ocean Retreat, and Sanctuary. Each newly built home focuses on first class luxury service and lifestyle. All condo homes give views from downtown to the ocean through 9' floor to ceiling windows and expansive terraces. The W comes fully furnished with all state of the art appliances. Moving into your new home at The W could not be any easier.

The W offers whatever you need whenever you need it.  There full time valet service, concierge service, and text for easy communication on deliveries and guest arrivals. There are two swimming pools, the Wet East is a heated pool with an oceanfront view, and the Wet West is a private saltwater pool: both can receive food and beverage service from WET Bar and Grill.  Focus on resetting your mind and body at the fitness center and full-service spa. From casual meals to fancy date nights, there are multiple restaurant options without even leaving your building.  The W Residences provides top quality care and service for its residents, leaving no need unmet.

name: Reach Brickell City Centre
intro_html:
Reach Brickell City Centre

Reach Brickell City Centre is a luxury condominium building located in the heart of Brickell. The 43-story building is comprised of 390 1- to 4-bedroom condo residences. Enjoy beautiful city views from floor-to-ceiling windows and doors or from the comfort of your expansive terrace. These luxurious condos feature open layouts with ultra-modern Italian kitchen cabinets by Italkraft, quartz stone countertops and backsplash, imported marble flooring, upgraded appliances, outdoor kitchens and ceiling heights of up to 11’4”. The 7 penthouse residences offer an even loftier space with 12’4” ceilings. Reach Brickell City Centre has the ideal urban luxury location where you are steps from exquisite dining, luxury shopping, retail and entertainment. Reach Brickell City Centre features a half-acre amenities deck for its residents enjoyment. This includes tropical gardens, barbecue grills, outdoor fitness areas, a state-of-the-art fitness center, a children’s play area, heated lap and social pools, hot tubs, a library, and a full-service hammam spa with dipping pools, and showers. The building offers on-site 24/7 concierge services and 24-hour valet service. Reach Brickell City Centre is located in Brickell at 68 SE 6th Street, Miami, Florida.

name: Waldorf Astoria Residences Miami
intro_html:
Waldorf Astoria Residences Miami

Waldorf Astoria Hotel and Residences Miami is a new wave of luxury gracing South FL. This building features unique eye-catching exterior architecture at a soaring height of 1,049 ft; the tallest residential building South of New York with unobstructed views of the city and downtown skyline. Waldorf residences located in Downtown Miami is a 100-story building with 360 branded private luxury residences and 205 hotel guest rooms and suites. Residents can look forward to true Waldorf service and concierge, exclusive hotel benefits like house account signing privileges, preferred access to the spa and other hotel venues, Beach Club access as well as full-service concierge and hospitality. Residents can choose from fully finished and furnished studios, or 1- to 4- bedroom residence floor plans. Enjoy amenities such as an immersive resort-style pool with an outdoor cafe and private cabanas, private bar and Wine Tasting Room, Waldorf Astoria personal concierge, beach club service, 24-hour emergency maintenance, and so much more. name: Panther National
intro_html:
Panther National

Panther National in Palm Beach Gardens is an exclusive new golf club community featuring an 18-hole championship golf course, 9-hole par 3 course, and world class practice facilities co-designed by Jack Nicklaus and Justin Thomas. This exclusive course is surrounded by a selection of Max Strang designed high end contemporary homes and an extensive array of world class amenities. The amazing Panther National property will feature luxury built .3-acre homes, .5-acre homes, and 1-acre homesites with 14 different floor plans. Residents can choose from contemporary and modern exterior architecture while custom-designed interiors enhance the grandeur of the home and make for an unforgettable experience. From spacious floor plans to gorgeous fixtures and appliances, Panther National is designed from top to bottom with luxury living in mind. Panther National is located in the desirable town of Palm Beach Gardens, Florida. Nearby you can find some of the best beaches and attractions that South Florida has to offer.
